ACT 9:40 IPyita l…î ma onya duu t…î mi ifoozu; si kw…¦s…¦ bib…î. Ngwi o kyata in…¦ k…¦ mbi ongyaa ikwukw…î n…¦, o gb…¦…¦, <<iTabyita, kyato.>> O kwulu in…¦, ngwi o di iPyita n…¦ta, o s…îk…¦ unto.
ACT 9:41 O kye ab…î byun yan ab…î non kye af…î dz…¦k…¦ es…¦. N…¦ o si kwu ama onoy…¦y…¦ ela b…¦yi ewakwad…¦ kyon nu ma oshishe.
ACT 9:42 Odz…¦ n…¦ gb…îfw…¦ kpats…¦ iJopa duu, inggis…¦ kwuba di noy…¦y…¦ mbi Ots…¦.
ACT 9:43 IPyita tila dz…¦ iJopa kye on…î kpakpa yi inggis…¦ okyid…î okpa okwookwo ngwu a li kwun di iSaim…în.
ACT 10:1 Ongyul…î oka dz…¦ iSisiria a li kwun di iK…în…¦lu, o li okwukwo ogbakwu nle di mi obyi oblakwuts…¦ mi Italia.
ACT 10:2 Ongwu yi et…î mgban duu kye itukwu nu di li mio Imgbasho; o li gha emi abub…î umba dzii di li b…î Imgbasho ib…î alon…î duu.
ACT 10:3 Egbe oka dafi obyi eta ngwi on…î tashulu akpa n…¦, o di in…¦ odiidi. O di ongyes…î mgbi Imgbasho saan, ba mbon wa gb…¦…¦, <<IK…în…¦lu!>>
ACT 10:4 IK…în…¦lu kye in…¦ fyakwun yi imio. O byita gb…¦…¦, <<Li …¦ky…¦, Ots…¦?>> Ongyes…î na nu uka gb…¦…¦, <<Ib…î yi umba mgbi abu ogha emi abub…î duu lu esho i y…¦…¦ ungw…î Imgbasho kale w…¦ abu.
ACT 10:5 D…î inggis…¦ es…î nu ma k…¦ iJopa ka yile inggis…¦ ngwu iyin di iSaim…în ngwu a li kwun di iPyita na on…¦n…¦ni.
ACT 10:6 O dz…¦ yi iSaim…în inggis…¦ okyid…î okpa, ngwu ud…¦ mgban dz…¦ ondekyoo okwukwo nani.>>
ACT 10:7 On…î ngwi ongyes…î ngwu gb…îdz…¦ yan na lu n…¦, iK…în…¦lu kwu engbid…î mgban efa ela b…¦yi inggis…¦ oblakwuts…¦ nli mio Imgbasho, di li onyi mbi ama ogban es…î.
ACT 10:8 O nya ma alungw…î nky…î duu man d…î ma es…î lu iJopa.
ACT 10:9 Tegblifan ngwi on…î d…î idzidz…¦ ud…¦ ngwi a le lu agaba ungw…î ma di dz…¦ kw…¦kw…¦ yi iJopa n…¦, iPyita d…îk…¦ ikpendu oka bib…î.
ACT 10:10 Onyagleu d…în o di mina ogye ungwogye. Ngwi a kale ky…î ungwogye n…¦, o di in…¦ odiidi.
ACT 10:11 O di esho kwulu a kye ungw…î dafi akwukw…î ogbada kye odi tsan mi okoko en…¦ naan luba es…¦.
ACT 10:12 Mi ifun ali it…î mmbwaba af…î en…¦, yi ungw…î ama okwo ifu es…¦ b…¦yi ali it…î ingwun…î emi esho duu woto ele.
ACT 10:13 N…¦ ela si nyan gb…¦…¦, <<Kyato, iPyita. Ngw…îlu ma gye.>>
ACT 10:14 IPyita nu uka gb…¦…¦, <<Ots…¦ mi otsitsi y…î ungw…î ka dz…¦ ngha gb…¦ ba. Lubana ani gye ungw…î onyi ntsiidza naadi le kp…¦kp…¦ ye ba.>>
ACT 10:15 Ela na diy…¦ nyan gb…¦…¦, <<Ka kwu ungw…î onyonyi ngwi Imgbasho kye m…¦lu saan gb…¦…¦ ungw…î idza ba.>>
ACT 10:16 Ungw…în…¦ ky…î ngha akpe eta, man a byakpa kyi kyelu akwukw…î na lu esho.
ACT 10:17 Ngwi iPyita kale ts…¦w…¦ ungw…î ngwi in…¦ odiidi n…¦ tso n…¦, inggis…¦ ama ngwu iK…în…¦lu d…î ma es…î ntona ka ye imbe ngwi ud…¦ iSaim…în dz…¦ man kwul…¦s…¦ tok…¦ onufoka.
ACT 10:18 A kwu ela, byita gb…¦…¦ ni ama ye ni iSaim…în ngwu a li kwun di iPyita na ka dz…¦ mmana may…î.
ACT 10:19 Dafi iPyita kale ts…¦w…¦ mi in…¦ odiidi n…¦, Onodzi nyan gb…¦…¦, <<iSaim…în, inggis…¦ eta to es…¦ le pita abu ma.
ACT 10:20 Nghan…¦ tashulu lu ozu es…¦. Ka fwa owaf…î yi ama lu ba, ikyesin…¦ li ani d…î ma es…î.>>
ACT 10:21 IPyita tashulu ka nya ma gb…¦…¦, <<Li ani li inggis…¦ ngwu ema le pitan mani. Ema ba li …¦ky…¦?>>
ACT 10:22 A gb…¦…¦, <<iK…în…¦lu okwukwo ogbakwu d…î eyi es…î. O li inggis…¦ osaan di li mio Imgbasho, ngwu emi iJuda duu li fwon. Ongyes…î osaan nyan gb…¦…¦ no nu abu ba ud…¦ mgban adzi non fwo odz…¦ ngwi abu ka gb…î nyan mani.>>
ACT 10:23 N…¦ iPyita gb…¦ ma kaka ud…¦ dafi ingyoga mgban mani. Tegblifan n…¦ iPyita kyato oky…¦…¦ yi ama, ama onoy…¦y…¦ angbeka mi iJopa kpaa di waf…î yi ama.
ACT 10:24 Ngwi egbe di fa n…¦, o kaka iSisiria. IK…în…¦lu kye in…¦ kwo of…¦ le f…¦ ma di kwu et…î b…¦yi abuge mgban duu kwakye.
ACT 10:25 Dafi iPyita wa to ud…¦ ma n…¦, iK…în…¦lu wa kw…¦s…¦ mi iyayi mbon di sunun.
ACT 10:26 Kpaa iPyita kye ab…î byun nyan gb…¦…¦, <<kyato, ani kpaa li inggis…¦ owamy…¦ dafi abu.>>
ACT 10:27 Ngwi iPyita kale gb…îdz…¦ yan n…¦, iPyita lu idzidz…¦ ozu ka di ibyi inggis…¦ kwakye to.
ACT 10:28 O nya ma gb…¦…¦: <<Ema ye saan ta gb…¦…¦ ola mgbi eyi fwa gb…¦…¦ inggis…¦ emi iJuda no ka kwakye yi Udzengye hona k…¦ ingyoga mi udan ba. Nghaduu Imgbasho tso ani gb…¦…¦ ni ani ka kwu inggis…¦ owamy…¦ gb…¦…¦ o le kp…¦kp…¦ hona tsiidza ba.
ACT 10:29 Nghan…¦ ngwi ema d…¦s…î mbi ani ma, ani tsondu ba ani ba. Ema d…¦s…î mbi ani li ali it…îdz…¦?>>
ACT 10:30 IK…în…¦lu nu uka gb…¦…¦, <<Egbe en…¦ in…¦ waani ani wodz…¦ ozu mbi ani le bib…î mi obyi eta it…î on…î n…¦ni. N…¦ta inggis…¦ wo angwuto onzundz…¦ kw…îkw…î wa mblegba tu ani
ACT 10:31 <<Si gb…¦…¦, <IK…în…¦lu Imgbasho fwo ib…î mgbi abu di w…¦ umba ngwi abu le gha emi adz…¦ mani.
ACT 10:32 Nghan…¦ d…¦s…î k…¦ iJopa mbi iSaim…în ngwu a li kwun di iPyita nani. O k…¦dz…¦ ingyoga mi ud…¦ iSaim…în inggis…¦ nli kyid…î okpa, ndz…¦ ondekyoo okwukwo nani.>
ACT 10:33 Man ani byakpa d…¦s…î mbi abu, i tishi dafi abu di ba mani. On…¦n…¦ eyi duu kwakye mm…¦n…¦ni mi inai Imgbasho ikye ofwo alungw…î ngwi Imgbasho wo abu ola gb…¦…¦ ni abu nya eyi mani.>>
ACT 10:34 IPyita si wita ogb…îdz…¦ gb…¦…¦: <<On…¦n…¦ ani difwi otsitsi gb…¦…¦ Imgbasho li tso osadu-sadu ba
ACT 10:35 kpaa li gbela yi inggis…¦ mi ali agw…î nli mion di kyungw…î nli ayin mani.
ACT 10:36 Ema ye es…î ngwi Imgbasho d…î mbi emi Israi, onya ma Es…î Osuse mgbi iyu ngwi ny…¦ mbi iYesu iKrestu, ongwu nli Ots…¦ mgbi alungw…î duu nani.
ACT 10:37 Ema ye ungw…î nky…î mi ikp…¦s…¦ iJudia duu, wita mi iGalalia mi on…î ngwi iJ…în gbees…î mgbi iBatisima ny…¦
ACT 10:38 dafi Imgbasho kye engyie kyi iYesu ongwi iNadzareti ikye yi Onodzi Osaan b…¦yi mfye, dafi o dile kyiky…¦ kpats…¦ le kyungw…î osuse dile ngy…¦lu ama ngbeka woto abumfye mgbi onodzi ibwubwe duu ootse, ikyesin…¦ Imgbasho dz…¦ biyan.
ACT 10:39 <<Eyi li obw…¦nd…¦ mi alungw…î ngwi o ky…î mi …¦s…¦ iJuda b…¦yi iJerosalin duu. A ngw…în mi okyon gbokwo ekwatsi,
ACT 10:40 nghaduu Imgbasho kyilon mi ikwu mi egbe ongwu ta mani di nu ma dun.
ACT 10:41 Li ali inggis…¦ duu din ba, kpaa li ama Imgbasho sadulu ma mbi eyi ama ngye di wa yan mi on…î ngwi o kyato mi ikwu ma li obw…¦nd…¦ aali.
ACT 10:42 O wo eyi ola gb…¦…¦ ni eyi gbees…î nya inggis…¦ di ky…î obw…¦nd…¦ gb…¦…¦ li ongwu ngwu Imgbasho dulu gb…¦…¦ ni ongwu li inggis…¦ ogb…î emi oshishe b…¦yi emi ikwukw…î ikw…î.
ACT 10:43 Oyegb…î duu ky…î obw…¦nd…¦ mi ikyon gb…¦…¦ ali inggis…¦ nnun oy…¦y…¦ duu a zanta yi alobube mi iyi mgban.>>
ACT 10:44 Ngwi iPyita kale gb…î elodz…¦ nton…¦ n…¦, Onodzi Osaan kaka mbi ali inggis…¦ ama nfwo es…î na duu.
ACT 10:45 I kwulu emi iJuda ama nkyiiky…¦ di noy…¦y…¦ waf…î yi iPyita ma ewo dafi umba mgbi Onodzi Osaan kpaa a kye nu Udzengye mani.
ACT 10:46 Lubana a fwo ma le gb…î ondudz…¦ angbeka dile ts…¦ Imgbasho. N…¦ta iPyita gb…¦…¦,
ACT 10:47 <<Inggis…¦ oka dz…¦ma nka fwa gb…¦…¦ nu ma ka ky…î inggis…¦ nton…¦ iBatisima mi eni ba gb…¦…¦? Lubana a gb…¦ Onodzi Osaan dafi eyi kpaa gb…¦ n…¦ni.>>
ACT 10:48 IPyita nu ondu gb…¦…¦ nu ma ky…î ma iBatisima mi iyi mgbi iYesu iKrestu. N…¦ a si nya iPyita gb…¦…¦ no dz…¦ yi ama mi egbe gwee.
ACT 11:1 Ama ogbikye iYesu b…¦yi ama onoy…¦y…¦ angbeka mi iJudia duu fwo dafi Udzengye kpaa gb…¦ elodz…¦ Imgbasho mani.
ACT 11:2 Dafi iPyita wa kaka iJerosalin n…¦ta, ama nnoy…¦y…¦ kyiiky…¦ kwun shany…¦
ACT 11:3 gb…¦…¦, <<Abu ka kaka ud…¦ ama okyiiky…¦ ba gye ungwogye yi ama.>>
ACT 11:4 IPyita wita di gb…î alungw…î duu nya ma kl…¦kl…¦ dafi i ky…î mani:
ACT 11:5 <<Ani dz…¦ igeli iJopa le bib…î, ani nuna lu kpini si di in…¦ odiidi. Ani di ungw…î dafi akwukw…î ogbada a kye odi tsan mi okoko en…¦ ky…¦ esho luba es…¦, di li imbe ani dz…¦ ma y…¦y…¦ ngwi i ba.
ACT 11:6 Ani win…¦ k…¦ ifun man di mmbwaba ama owo af…î en…¦, mmbwaba ama okwukwo, mmbwaba ama okwo ifu es…¦, b…¦yi ingwun…î emi esho.
ACT 11:7 Ta ani fwo ela le nya ani gb…¦…¦, <Kyato iPyita, ngw…îlu ma gye.>
ACT 11:8 <<Ani nu uka gb…¦…¦, <Ots…¦ mi otsitsi y…î ungw…î ka dz…¦ ngha gb…¦ ba. Lubana ani gye ungw…î onyi ntsiidza naadi le kp…¦kp…¦ ye ba.>
ACT 11:9 <<Ela na diy…¦ nya ani gb…¦…¦, <Ka kwu ungw…î onyonyi ngwi Imgbasho kye m…¦lu saan gb…¦…¦ ungw…î idza ba.>
ACT 11:10 Ungw…în…¦ ky…î ngha akpe eta, man a di kyi kwolu y…¦ lu esho.
ACT 11:11 <<Mi on…î nata engyul…î nghi eta ngwu a d…î ma es…î ky…¦ iSisiria ba mbi ani wa kwul…¦s…¦ to ud…¦ ngwi ani ladz…¦ mani.
ACT 11:12 Onodzi nya ani gb…¦…¦ ni ani ka kwagbini owaf…î lu yi ama ba. Ama onoy…¦y…¦ nghi egyin nton…¦ kpaa tawo ani, ka kaka ud…¦ inggis…¦ nani.
ACT 11:13 O nya eyi dafi ongyes…î mblegba tu ongwu mi ozu mgban di gb…¦…¦, <D…¦s…î k…¦ mbi iSaim…în mi iJopa ngwu a li kwun di iPyita nani.
ACT 11:14 O ka nya abu es…î ngwi abu yi et…î mgbi abu duu ka wat…î mi ele mani.>
ACT 11:15 <<Dafi ani wita ogb…îdz…¦ n…¦, Onodzi Osaan ba mboma dafi i teyi ba mbi eyi mi owita-wita nani.
ACT 11:16 Ta ani w…¦ odz…¦ ngwi Ots…¦ nose gb…î mani, gb…¦…¦: <iJ…în ky…î iBatisima mi eni, kpaa a ka ky…î ema iBatisima mi Onodzi Osaan.>
ACT 11:17 Nghan…¦ kini Imgbasho nu ma umba ungwonyi dafi o nu eyi ama nnoy…¦y…¦ mbi Ots…¦ iYesu iKrestu n…¦ ma, ani li em…¦ mi on…î na okye af…î tw…¦s…¦ fwa yi Imgbasho?>>
ACT 11:18 Ngwi a fwo ungw…în…¦ n…¦, a kiyayi otangwodz…¦ wuba man ts…¦ Imgbasho, le gb…¦…¦, <<Alima, Imgbasho gbela yi Udzengye kpaa odzita ma yi obube nu ma tu oshishe.>>
ACT 11:19 Ikyenghan…¦, ama onoy…¦y…¦ nganya ikye ikwu iStivin n…¦, tse lu iFonishia, iSapru, b…¦yi Anti…îku, le gbees…î nya emi iJuda yuoma kyoon.
ACT 11:20 Angbeka mboma, dafi i dz…¦ duu kpaa, a li emi iSapru b…¦yi iSirini, lu Anti…îku ka wita ogb…îdz…¦ yi emi iGriki kpaa, le nya ma Es…î Osuse mgbi Ots…¦ iYesu.
ACT 11:21 Abumfye mgbi Ots…¦ dz…¦ yi ama, n…¦ inggis…¦ kwuba noy…¦y…¦ di kyata luba mbi Ots…¦.
ACT 11:22 Odz…¦ n…¦ kaka ad…î mgbi emi okwakye mgbi emi iKrestu mi iJerosalin, man a d…î iBanabasi es…î k…¦ Anti…îku.
ACT 11:23 Ngwi o ka kaka di di dafi Imgbasho kye mse b…¦ inggis…¦ ntona ewo n…¦, atsa tsan o di fyuma mfye itukwu duu gb…¦…¦ nu ma kwul…¦s…¦ mi otsitsi mbi Ots…¦ yi itukwu mgbi ama duu.
ACT 11:24 Lubana iBanabasi li inggis…¦ osuse, di mbwo yi Onodzi Osaan b…¦yi oy…¦y…¦ onuunu. Ikyenghan…¦ inggis…¦ kwuba luba mbi Ots…¦.
ACT 11:25 N…¦ iBanabasi k…¦ iTasu oka pita iSol,
ACT 11:26 ngwi o ka tun n…¦, o kyon luba Anti…îku. Mi onova na duu iBanabasi yi iSol li kwakye yi okwakye mgbi emi iKrestu di tso ibyi inggis…¦ kpakpa ungw…î. Li mi Anti…îku abab…î ngwi a wita okwu ama oky…¦d…î iYesu di emi iKrestu.
ACT 11:27 Mi on…î n…¦ oyegb…î angbeka ky…¦ iJerosalin bato Anti…îku.
ACT 11:28 Onyi mboma, ngwu iyin di Agabu, kyato gb…¦…¦s…¦ ny…¦ mi Onodzi gb…¦…¦ onikyenbwa ka gbo kpats…¦ …¦s…¦ iRoma. (Ungw…în…¦ ky…î mi on…î ngwi iKladi…îsu li ut…î.)
ACT 11:29 Ama oky…¦d…î iYesu mi Anti…îku kye ali it…î oyab…î ngwi ama dz…¦yan duu d…¦s…î nu emi ongwun…î ma mi iJudia.
ACT 11:30 Ungw…î ngwi a li ky…î y…î, a li kye umba mgbi ama d…¦s…î ny…¦ mbi iBanabasi yi iSol k…¦ mbi engyukwo mgbi ama mi iJerosalin.
ACT 12:1 Li mi it…în…î n…¦ ngwi ut…î iHerude wita obwa emi iKrestu angbeka, yi oweka onu ma is…î.
ACT 12:2 O teyi ngw…î iJ…¦nsi ongwun…î iJ…în mi okwusunkli.
ACT 12:3 Ngwi o di gb…¦…¦ i kpa emi iJuda n…¦, o kiyayi di bwa iPyita kpaa. Ungw…în…¦ ky…î mi on…î mgbi ibredi ngwi a li kye okwuna wele ba nani.
ACT 12:4 Dafi o bwan n…¦, o kyon wok…¦ obawi di kyon d…î ama ongyoongyo ub…î, oblakwuts…¦ eneen…¦ mi otsa en…¦ duu. IHerude dz…¦ yi oweka owa dulun t…î ba wa gb…în ikw…î mi ododa mi on…î ngwi oga ow…¦ owat…î-wat…î mgbi emi Israi ngy…¦ mani.
ACT 12:5 IPyita tila wodz…¦ obawi, kpaa okwakye mgbi emi iKrestu y…î le bib…î mi itukwu onyi mbi Imgbasho ikyon.
ACT 12:6 Mi obwi egbe ngwi iHerude ka kyon t…î wa gb…în ikw…î ma, iPyita la le nuna mi idzidz…¦ oblakwuts…¦ nghi efa, a bwan adi agya efa, ama ongyoongyo di to onuf…¦ okakaakaka.
ACT 12:7 Pl…¦ n…¦ta ongyes…î mgbi Ots…¦ wa mblegba tu ma ta obawi si gbosa. O kye ab…î mu iPyita mi agya kyilen una, o nyan gb…¦…¦, <<Kyato Pl…¦!>> Man ashi ntona sh…¦ lon mi owashi ab…î yangwuta.
ACT 12:8 Ongyes…î na si nyan gb…¦…¦, <<Gbe angwuto mgbi abu wo b…¦yi okpaf…î.>> IPyita si ky…î ngha. Ongyes…î na di nyan gb…¦…¦, kye angwuto ofu mgbi abu tukwu ky…¦d…î ani.
ACT 12:9 IPyita ky…¦d…în tas…¦ mi obawi, kpaa i gbosa lon gb…¦…¦ ungw…î ngwi ongyes…î le ky…î na li otsitsi ba, o ts…¦w…¦ gb…¦…¦ ongwu le woowo elela.
ACT 12:10 A ny…¦ imbe ongyoongyo ongwi abab…î b…¦yi ongwu fan, di wa to onuf…¦ ashashi nt…î lu ogalu nani. I kwulu ewon, man a ny…¦ ele tas…¦. Ngwi a kyiky…¦ lu byulu n…¦, ongyes…î na byulu dzanta.
ACT 12:11 N…¦ta iPyita difwi di gb…¦…¦, <<On…¦n…¦ ani ye y…¦y…¦ gb…¦…¦ Ots…¦ d…î ongyes…î mgban gb…¦…¦ no wa dulu ani t…î mi abumfye mgbi iHerude b…¦yi alungw…î ngwi emi iJuda le ts…¦w…¦ ikye ani duu.>>
ACT 12:12 Ngwi o wa difwi ungw…în…¦ n…¦, o lu ud…¦ iMeri on…î iJ…în, ngwi a di li kwun gb…¦…¦ iMaki, imbe ngwi ibyi inggis…¦ kwakye to dile bib…î.
ACT 12:13 IPyita tsaab…î mi onuf…¦ ongwi es…¦, man ongwongyiid…î ngwu iyin di iRoda ba owa ye inggis…¦ ndz…¦ onuf…¦ mani.
ACT 12:14 Ngwi o difwi ela mgbi iPyita n…¦, atsa atsan ny…¦s…¦ o kwulu of…¦ wuba kpaa y…¦ tsinya lu dile kwu-ela gb…¦…¦, <<iPyita dz…¦ onuf…¦ ma!>>
ACT 12:15 Kpaa a nyan gb…¦…¦, <<O dz…¦ yi ikye y…¦y…¦ ba.>> Dafi o kale kiyayi gb…¦…¦ di li otsitsi n…¦, a nyan gb…¦…¦, <<Ka li ongyes…î mgban ky…¦m…¦.>>
ACT 12:16 Nghaduu iPyita y…î kale tsaab…î kp…î…î ma, ngwi a wa kye kwulu of…¦ n…¦, a din man i kwulu ma ewo.
ACT 12:17 IPyita ky…î ma ab…î gb…¦…¦ nu ma dede si tsuutsa dafi Ots…¦ dulu ongwu t…î mi obawi mani. O di gb…¦…¦, <<Nya iJ…¦nsi b…¦yi ama onoy…¦y…¦ odz…¦ mi ungw…în…¦ni.>> N…¦man o si lu imbe oka.
ACT 12:18 Ngwi egbe fa n…¦, …¦nd…¦ ol…¦l…¦ efu ba dz…¦ mi idzidz…¦ ama oblakwuts…¦ mi ungw…î nky…î yi iPyita nani.
ACT 12:19 Ngwi iHerude gbilin kpats…¦ din ba n…¦, o diy…¦ kya mbi ama ongyoongyo ntonani si nu ondu gb…¦…¦ nu ma ngw…î ma. N…¦ iHerude ky…¦…¦ mi iJudia lu iSisiria ka kye egbe gwee mi ele.
ACT 12:20 IHerude teyi dz…¦ yi odz…¦ oshiishi yi emi iTiru b…¦yi iSidon; a y…¦ kwakye yi ewoma di pita of…¦ ogb…îdz…¦ yan. Ngwi a tu oyab…î mgbi iBlastu, ongbid…î mgbi ut…î yuon ngwu a nun oy…¦y…¦ n…¦, a k…¦ mbi ut…î ka pita iyu, ikyeky…¦ li …¦s…¦ mgbi ut…î na li nu ma ungwogye.
ACT 12:21 Mi egbe ngwi a kye dz…¦ ma, iHerude gbe angwuto mgban mgbi ut…î wo ewo, s…îk…¦ itsuut…î mgban man gb…îdz…¦ yi ama mi ododa.
ACT 12:22 A wulu gb…¦…¦, <<N…¦n…¦ li ela mgbi Imgbasho li mgbi inggis…¦ ba.>>
ACT 12:23 Ikyegb…¦…¦ iHerude ts…¦ Imgbasho ba n…¦, Ongyes…î mgbi Ots…¦ tan af…¦, ta o gbaangbi byakpa kwulu.
ACT 12:24 Nghaduukpaa elodz…¦ mgbi Imgbasho kiyayi osheeshe di gb…îfw…¦.
ACT 12:25 Ngwi iBanabasi b…¦yi iSol ngy…¦lu ungw…î ngwi a k…¦ ma n…¦, a y…¦ mi iJerosalin, a kye iJ…în ngwu a li kwun di iMaki na waf…î yi ama.
ACT 13:1 Mi okwakye mgbi emi iKrestu mi Anti…îku ma, ama ogb…¦…¦s…¦ yi etsetse to ele; li iBanabasi yi iSimi…în ngwu a li kwun di iNaija b…¦yi iLush…î ongwi iSirini yi iMane (ongwu nshe b…¦yi iHerude iG…îna nani) yi iSol.
ACT 13:2 Ngwi a tole sunu Ots…¦ dile tukwondu n…¦, Onodzi Osaan gb…î yi ama gb…¦…¦, <<Dulu iBanabasi yi iSol dz…¦k…¦ idzidza mi ikye id…î ngwi ani kwu ma ela ikyon mani.
ACT 13:3 Ngwi a tukwondu diy…¦ bib…î n…¦ta, a gbe ab…î d…î ma ikye di wo ma of…¦ lu.
ACT 13:4 Ngwi Onodzi Osaan d…î ma es…î n…¦, iBanabasi yi iSol byi of…¦ ab…î lu ka kaka iSelushia si kaka uwaa dz…¦kyo lu ibu ongwi iSapru.
ACT 13:5 Ngwi a wa to iSalami n…¦, a gbees…î mgbi Imgbasho mi ozu okwakye mgbi emi iJuda. IJ…în iMaki ky…¦ yi ama le tobyi ma.
ACT 13:6 A kyiky…¦ kpats…¦ ibu na nghataa wa kaka iPafosu. Mi imbe n…¦ a kpats…¦ yi inggis…¦ iJuda otseefa di li oyegb…î atsika ngwu iyin di iBa-iYesu,
ACT 13:7 nli ky…¦ yi iSeji…î iPa…îl…îsu iG…îna ongwi ibu nani. IG…îna na, li inggis…¦ ndz…¦ yi ozoyeye saan, o d…¦s…î mbi iBanabasi yi iSol ikyeky…¦ o mina ofwo elodz…¦ Imgbasho.
ACT 13:8 Kpaa Elimasi inggis…¦ otseefa na (bana li ita iyi mgban aali) kaka ma idzidz…¦ fwa yi iG…îna na gb…¦…¦ no ka noy…¦y…¦ mi odz…¦ ngwi iBanabasi yi iSol le gb…î na ba.
ACT 13:9 N…¦ iSol, ngwu iyin oka di iPol, nmbwo yi Onodzi Osaan na tongwin…¦ byi Elimasi nyan gb…¦…¦,
ACT 13:10 <<Abu ongw…¦ owap…¦ olodu nli ongyikyili mgbi alungw…î osuse duu n…¦! Abu mbwo yi ali …¦w…¦ yi okpagyewo duu. Abu ka nya ombe of…¦ mgbi Ots…¦ nli ayin n…¦ lo?
ACT 13:11 Nghan…¦ ab…î mgbi Ots…¦ kpakli abu wa. O ka bin…¦, mi ongwon…î gwee o ka di osa mgbi on…î ba.>> Ntunto n…¦ta in…¦ tuubu lon man o y…¦…¦ pwaapwa dile mina inggis…¦ nka kwon ab…î t…î mani.
ACT 13:12 Ngwi iG…îna di ungw…î nky…î n…¦, o noy…¦y…¦, bana i kwulun ewo mi otsootso odz…¦ mgbi Ots…¦.
ACT 13:13 IPol yi emi afoky…¦…¦ mgban kaka uwaa mi iPafosu luba iPega, igeli mi iPamfyilia, li imbe na ngwi iJ…în ngwu iyin oka di iMaki na dzita ma y…¦ lu iJerosalin aali.
ACT 13:14 Mi iPega ma, a kyato lu Anti…îku ongwi iPisidia. Mi egbe otonyewo n…¦, a kaka ozu okwakye mgbi emi iJuda di sis…¦.
ACT 13:15 On…î ngwi a gb…î mi af…¦ mgbi Ola mgbi iMose b…¦yi af…¦ mgbi emi Oyegb…î ny…¦ n…¦ta, ama odi mi ozu okwakye mgbi emi iJuda na d…¦s…î mboma gb…¦…¦, <<Emi ongwunani, ni ema dz…¦ yi es…î mgbi onu itukwu ofyumfye-fyumfye ikye inggis…¦ nton…¦ y…î, gb…î na.>>
ACT 13:16 IPol dz…¦kunto ky…î ma ab…î si gb…¦…¦: <<Emi Israi b…¦yi Udzengye ama osunu Imgbasho, gad…î mbi ani na!
ACT 13:17 Imgbasho mgbi emi Israi dulu emi otseyi; o nu ma okiyayi mi on…î ngwi a to Igyibiti mani, mi abumfye odatu o dulu ma t…î mi …¦s…¦ nani,
ACT 13:18 o shitukwu yi oky…î…îky…î mgbi ama mi afutse onova ngwusefa,
ACT 13:19 di dzili agw…¦…¦s…¦ egyafa mi iKana kye ikp…¦s…¦ mgbi ama kye nu emidi ongwu no y…¦…¦ okwud…¦ mgbi ama.
ACT 13:20 Ungw…î nton…¦ duu kye m…¦ onova ideli en…¦ ngwusefa d…în iwyo. <<Ngwi ungw…în…¦ ky…î ny…¦ n…¦, Imgbasho gbe ama ogbiikw…î nu ma nghataa ba on…î mgbi oyegb…î iSamue.
ACT 13:21 N…¦ inggis…¦ ntona si mina ut…î, man Imgbasho kye iSol ongw…¦ iKish, mi udz…¦ mgbi iBenjamin nu ma, o s…î ut…î onova ngwusefa.
ACT 13:22 Ngwi o wa dulu iSol ut…î n…¦, o nu iDevedi y…¦…¦ ut…î mgbi ama. O ky…î obw…¦nd…¦ ikyon gb…¦…¦: <Ani tu iDevedi ongw…¦ iJese inggis…¦ ongwi itukwu mgbi ani, o ka ky…î alungw…î duu ngwi ani mina gb…¦…¦ no ky…î mani.>
ACT 13:23 <<Mi et…î mgbi inggis…¦ n…¦, Imgbasho kye ongye Onagb…¦ iYesu nu emi Israi, dafi o zondu mani.
ACT 13:24 Duuse ni iYesu wita id…î y…î, iJ…în gbees…î okyatitukwu b…¦yi iBatisima nya ali inggis…¦ duu mi Israi.
ACT 13:25 Ngwi iJ…în le ngy…¦lu id…î mgban n…¦, o byi ma gb…¦…¦: <Ema ts…¦w…¦ gb…¦…¦ ani li em…¦? Ani li ongwu ma ba. Ei, o ky…¦ma mi iyikpa ani, odi okpaf…î mgban kpaa ani m…¦ osh…¦ ba.>
ACT 13:26 <<Emi ongwunani, engw…¦ Abrahan, b…¦yi Udzengye ama omio Imgbasho, li ikye mgbi eyi ngwi a kye es…î mgbi owat…î-wat…î n…¦ ba aani.
ACT 13:27 Inggis…¦ emi iJerosalin b…¦yi ama ogbe ma teyi difwi it…î inggis…¦ ngwu iYesu dz…¦ ma ba, kpaa mi ongw…în ikw…î y…î, a mbwumbwo ungw…î ngwi ama ogb…¦…¦s…¦ li tsekise gb…î mi alegbe otonyewo mani.
ACT 13:28 Dafi a tu it…îdz…¦ nm…¦ ongw…în ba n…¦ kpaa, a nya iPlatu gb…¦…¦ no nu ondu nu ma ka ngw…în.
ACT 13:29 Ngwi a kyi ky…îlu alungw…î ngwi a l…î ikpewon duu ma ngy…¦ n…¦, a tashulun mi ekwatsi di kyon ndzi.
ACT 13:30 Nghaduu Imgbasho kyilon mi ikwongye,
ACT 13:31 egbe ibyibyi ama nwaf…î yan mi iGalalia k…¦ iJerosalin ma din. A li obw…¦nd…¦ mgban mbi emideyi on…¦n…¦ni.
ACT 13:32 <<Eyi le nya ema Es…î Osuse n…¦ni: Li ungw…î ngwi Imgbasho zondu yi emi otseyi
ACT 13:33 o mbwumbwo ikye eyi emi ongwama, mi okyile iYesu mi ikwongye. Dafi a tsekise l…în mi af…¦ mgbi ashi ongwu fan mani gb…¦…¦: << <Abu li Ongwani; in…¦ n…¦ ani y…¦…¦ Otsabu.>
ACT 13:34 Ikyegb…¦…¦ Imgbasho kyilen mi ikwu, dika non bwa ba n…¦ kpaa, a l…în mi elodz…¦ nton…¦ni gb…¦…¦: << <N ka kye ondu odz…¦…¦dz…¦ osaan b…¦yi mse ingblim…î ngwi ani teyi dz…¦ yi iDevedi ma nu abu.>
ACT 13:35 Li ngha ngwi a l…î imbe oka gb…¦…¦: << <Abu ka nu Ongwabu Osaan mbee ba aali.>
ACT 13:36 <<Lubana ngwi iDevedi ky…î oweka mgbi Imgbasho ngy…¦ duu n…¦, o kwulu; a kyon ndzi yi emi ots…în ikpewo mgban bwa.
ACT 13:37 Nghaduu ongwu Imgbasho kyilon mi ikwu na bwa ba.
ACT 13:38 <<Ikyenghan…¦, emi ongwunani, i mina ani gb…¦…¦ ni ema ye gb…¦…¦ li ikpewo iYesu ngwi a gbees…î odzita inggis…¦ yi ali ibwubwe nya ema aani.
ACT 13:39 Mi ikpewon ali inggis…¦ ngwu noy…¦y…¦ duu gye emy…¦my…¦, ola mgbi iMose yagba kyungw…în…¦ ba.
ACT 13:40 Gb…¦w…¦byi ni ungw…î ngwi ama ogb…¦…¦s…¦ gb…î ntona no ka ky…î ema ba ungw…î ama ngb…¦…¦:
ACT 13:41 << <Dii, ema ama ogb…î agya, kwu Imgbasho shany…¦ nton…¦, ka kwulu ema ewo, ema dika dzili. Ani ka kyungw…î mi egbe mgbi ema ngwi ema ka noy…¦y…¦ ba yeba ni inggis…¦ nyaanya ema kpaa.> >>
ACT 13:42 Dafi iPol yi iBanabasi le dzita ozu okwakye mgbi emi iJuda n…¦, inggis…¦ ntona b…î ma gb…¦…¦ nu ma di wa gb…îdz…¦ mi it…îdz…¦ nton…¦ mi egbe otonyid…î nky…¦ n…¦ni.
ACT 13:43 On…î ngwi a ngy…¦lu okwakye n…¦, emi iJuda ibyibyi b…¦yi ama nkyata le sunu odz…¦ Imgbasho mgbi emi iJuda ma, ky…¦d…î iPol yi iBanabasi, a gb…îdz…¦ yi ama di nu ma itukwu ofyumfye-fyumfye gb…¦…¦ nu ma kiyayi odz…¦ mi elela mgbi Imgbasho.
ACT 13:44 Mi egbe otonyid…î ngb…îd…î ma, i dz…¦ dafi inggis…¦ mi ogalu duu kwakye ikye ofwo elodz…¦ mgbi Ots…¦ mani.
ACT 13:45 Ngwi emi iJuda di ibyi inggis…¦ ntona n…¦, a kaka uwaba dile fyito mi odz…¦ ngwi iPol le gb…î mani.
ACT 13:46 N…¦ iPol yi iBanabasi nu ma uka yi ab…î otsig…¦g…¦ gb…¦…¦: <<Dz…¦ gy…î ngwi eyi kika gb…îdz…¦ Imgbasho nya ema abab…î. Kpaa ngwi ema fwan di kye ewema wuuta otu oshishe igyegwu ba n…¦, eyi yile in…¦ byi Udzengye on…¦n…¦ni.
ACT 13:47 Lubana n…¦n…¦ li ungw…î ngwi Ots…¦ wo eyi ola mi ele aani gb…¦…¦: << <Ani nu abu li osa mbi Udzengye, ikyegb…¦…¦ ni abu kye es…î mgbi owat…î-wat…î kpats…¦ …¦s…¦.> >>
ACT 13:48 On…î ngwi Udzengye fwo odz…¦ n…¦ n…¦, ewo sh…¦ta lo ma a di kye mmw…¦ nu elodz…¦ mgbi Ots…¦; ama ngwu a di sadu ma ikye oshishe igyegwu duu noy…¦y…¦.
ACT 13:49 Elodz…¦ mgbi Ots…¦ si gb…îfw…¦ kpats…¦ ay…¦s…¦ na duu.
ACT 13:50 Nghaduu emi iJuda kaka mbi engyaa ama omio Imgbasho ama nle kp…îng…î b…¦yi inggis…¦ ama ogbe inggis…¦ teyi mi ogalu nani. A nu ma wita eye yi iPol b…¦yi iBanabasi, di l…î ma onya t…î mi ay…¦s…¦ nani.
ACT 13:51 Nghan…¦ a kyi gbolu ombulu mi af…î mgbi ama dafi a gbela yi ama ba mani, ta a si lu iKonu.
ACT 13:52 Man engwaf…î si mbwo yi atsa b…¦yi Onodzi Osaan.
ACT 14:1 IPol yi iBanabasi ka kaka ozu okwakye mgbi emi iJuda mi iKonu dafi a teyi li ky…î mani. Mi ele ma a gbees…î saan ta mmbwo inggis…¦ kwuba mi iJuda b…¦yi Udzengye onoy…¦y…¦.
ACT 14:2 Kpaa emi iJuda ama nfwa onoy…¦y…¦ ntona kwo Udzengye ntona wo nu ma kyitingga yi iPol b…¦yi iBanabasi.
ACT 14:3 Nghan…¦ iPol yi iBanabasi kye on…î kpakpa mi ele, le gb…îdz…¦ mgbi Ots…¦ mi ododa. Ots…¦ tso gb…¦…¦ es…î mgbi elela mgban na li otsitsi mi onu ma mfye okyungw…î b…¦yi amb…¦ ama okwulewo.
ACT 14:4 Emi ogalu na gheefa, angbeka y…¦ agya mgbi emi iJuda, angbeka y…¦ agya mgbi ama ogbikye iYesu.
ACT 14:5 Ta Udzengye yi emi iJuda b…¦yi engyukwo mgbi ama duu, wibu onu iPol b…¦yi iBanabasi adz…¦ di ts…¦ ma akwuts…¦.
ACT 14:6 Nghaduu ngwi a wa ye odz…¦ ele n…¦ a tsinya lu iLikonia igeli mgbi iListra b…¦yi iDebe b…¦yi …¦s…¦ ama nkpak…¦k…¦ won,
ACT 14:7 dika gbees…î osuse mi imbe ntonani.
ACT 14:8 Inggis…¦ oka dz…¦ iListra waawaa af…î, tummya ky…¦ ifu di kyiky…¦ ye ba.
ACT 14:9 O kye ad…î ge le fwo iPol dafi o le gb…îdz…¦ mani. IPol kye in…¦ byin y…¦y…¦, difwi gb…¦…¦ o dz…¦ yi oy…¦y…¦ onuunu ongy…¦lun ootse,
ACT 14:10 si kwu ela t…î gb…¦…¦, <<Kyato dz…¦kunto mi af…î mgbi abu!>> Mi elodz…¦ n…¦, inggis…¦ na ta lu esho si wita okyiky…¦.
ACT 14:11 On…î ngwi ibyi ntona di ungw…î ngwi iPol ky…î n…¦, a wulu mi ondu iLikonia gb…¦…¦, <<Imgbasho gbeka ba mbi eyi mi odz…¦…¦dz…¦ mgbi inggis…¦ owamy…¦ wa!>>
ACT 14:12 IBanabasi a kwun gb…¦…¦ iDzeu, a di kwu iPol gb…¦…¦ iH…¦m…¦ ikyesin…¦ o li inggis…¦ oteyi odz…¦ ogb…î…îgb…î.
ACT 14:13 Ta inggis…¦ ofif…¦ mgbi imgbasho mgbi iDzeu, ngwu ozu ofif…¦ mgban dz…¦ kyila yi igeli okwukwo nani, ba yi engyulumnda b…¦yi ofumbu wa to onuf…¦ ogalu igeli ikyesin…¦ ongwu b…¦yi ibyi inggis…¦ ntona mina ofif…¦ nu iPol b…¦yi iBanabasi.
ACT 14:14 Nghaduu ngwi iPol yi iBanabasi fwo ungw…în…¦ n…¦, a fawa angwuto mgbi ama tsinya kaka idzidz…¦ ibyi inggis…¦, le weela gb…¦…¦:
ACT 14:15 <<Engyul…î, ky…îsin…¦ ngwi ema le kyungw…în…¦ nghaa? Eyi kpaa li inggis…¦ owamy…¦ ta dafi ema mani. Eyi kye es…î osuse n…¦ le wa nu ema, le nya ema gb…¦…¦ ni ema kyata mi ayayi ungw…î nton…¦ni luba mbi Imgbasho oshishe, ongwu nta esho yi es…¦ b…¦yi ekyoo okwukwo b…¦yi alungw…î ama nto efu duu nani.
ACT 14:16 Tugbe ma, Imgbasho li nu ali …¦s…¦ duu ky…î owitukwu mgbi ama.
ACT 14:17 Nghaduu o li nya okye ewon tso ma ba. O tso ema mse mgban mi onu ema mmbwo di nu et…î ungwogye she mi on…î mgban; o nu ema ungwogye kpakpa di mbwo ema yi atsa mi itukwu.>>
ACT 14:18 Yi elodz…¦ nton…¦ duu kpaa, i fyi ma mfye okw…î ibyi inggis…¦ ntona ofif…¦ nu ma.
ACT 14:19 Ta emi iJuda angbeka ky…¦ mi Anti…îku b…¦yi iKonu wa kwolu ibyi inggis…¦ luba agya mgbi ama. N…¦ a ts…¦ iPol akwuts…¦ di kwon tas…¦ mi ogalu nani, le ts…¦w…¦ gb…¦…¦ o kwulu.
ACT 14:20 Kpaa ngwi engwaf…î wa kpak…¦k…¦ won n…¦, o kyato diy…¦ lu ogalu nani. Tegblifan ma ongwu b…¦yi iBanabasi dzata imbe na lu iDebe.
ACT 14:21 A gbees…î osuse mi igeli okwukwo nani di tu inggis…¦ ama onoy…¦y…¦ kwuba. Man a y…¦ lu iListra, iKonu b…¦yi Anti…îku,
ACT 14:22 a yile engwaf…î dz…¦ of…¦ di kwu ma …¦w…¦wo gb…¦…¦ nu ma noy…¦y…¦ mi otsitsi. A di nya ma gb…¦…¦, <<Eyi ka ny…¦ mi adz…¦ kpakpa ikye okaka esut…î mgbi Imgbasho.>>
ACT 14:23 IPol b…¦yi iBanabasi dulu engyukwo nu ma mi ali okwakye mgbi emi iKrestu duu, yi ib…î ob…î…îb…î b…¦yi ondu otukwu-tukwu, a kye ma dub…î Ots…¦, ongwu a kye oy…¦y…¦ onuunu mgbi ama byi mbon nani.
ACT 14:24 A ny…¦ ongwi iPisidia, a wa kaka iPamfyilia,
ACT 14:25 ngwi a gbees…î mi iPega ngy…¦ n…¦, a kye ikye d…î lu Atalia.
ACT 14:26 Mi Atalia ma a dz…¦kyo mi uwaa yid…î lu Anti…îku, imbe ngwi a kye ma dub…î elela mgbi Imgbasho mi ikye id…î ngwi a ky…î ngy…¦ nani.
ACT 14:27 Ngwi a kaka imbe na ma, a gbe emi iKrestu kwakye mbonyi di nya ma alungw…î ngwi Imgbasho ky…î ny…¦ mbi ama, dafi o di kwulu of…¦ mgbi oy…¦y…¦ onuunu mbi Udzengye kpaa mani.
ACT 14:28 A si dz…¦ yi engwaf…î mi imbe na on…î tunto.
ACT 15:1 Inggis…¦ angbeka ky…¦ mi iJudia wa kaka Anti…îku man le tso ama onoy…¦y…¦ ntona gb…¦…¦: <<Sede a ka ky…¦ ema iky…¦ mi otsootso mgbi iMose bay…î, ema ka yagba otu owat…î-wat…î ba.>>
ACT 15:2 Mi odz…¦ n…¦ iPol b…¦yi iBanabasi si kaka angwodz…¦ ota-ta yi ama kpakpa. Ta a si dulu iPol yi iBanabasi, b…¦yi ama onoy…¦y…¦ angbeka, gb…¦…¦ nu ma lu iJerosalin ka di ama ogbikye iYesu b…¦yi engyukwo mi odz…¦ n…¦ni.
ACT 15:3 Opokwakye mgbi emi iKrestu d…î ma es…î nu ma byi of…¦ ab…î, dafi a kyiky…¦ ny…¦ iFonishia b…¦yi iSamaria n…¦, a gb…î dafi Udzengye kpaa kyata y…¦ luba mbi Imgbasho mani. Elodz…¦ n…¦ nu ama onoy…¦y…¦ duu ewo osh…¦ta kpaakpaa.
ACT 15:4 Ngwi a wa kaka iJerosalin n…¦, okwakye mgbi emi iKrestu yi ama ogbikye iYesu b…¦yi engyukwo duu gb…¦ ma, n…¦ta a nya ma alungw…î ngwi Imgbasho ky…î ny…¦ mbi ama duu.
ACT 15:5 Ta ama onoy…¦y…¦ angbeka ama ndz…¦ agya mgbi emi iFarasi ma ky…¦…¦ tok…¦ unto si gb…îgb…¦…¦, <<Li ky…¦m…¦-ky…¦m…¦ ngwi a ka nu Udzengye kyiiky…¦, di ngyo ola mgbi iMose.>>
ACT 15:6 Nghan…¦ ama ogbikye iYesu b…¦yi engyukwo kyi ikye kwokyi yi ewoma ikye odi mi odz…¦ n…¦ni.
ACT 15:7 Ngwi a gb…îdz…¦ kpakpa n…¦, iPyita ky…¦…¦ unto si gb…îdz…¦ yi ama gb…¦…¦, <<Emi ongwunani, ema ye dafi mi on…î ama ny…¦ ma Imgbasho dulu ani mi idzidz…¦ ema ogb…î Es…î Osuse mi ondu mgbi ani ni Udzengye fwo di noy…¦y…¦ mani.
ACT 15:8 Imgbasho n ye itukwu mgbi inggis…¦ duu ma, tso gb…¦…¦ di ongwu gb…¦ Udzengye mi okye Onodzi Osaan nu ma, y…¦y…¦ dafi o ky…î yi eyi n…¦ni.
ACT 15:9 O tso idzidza mgbi eyi yi ama ba, lubana o salu ma itukwu y…¦…¦ saan ikyeky…¦ a noy…¦y…¦.
ACT 15:10 Nghama, ky…îsin…¦ ngwi ema le fya ombadi Imgbasho mi okye okye egyeegy…¦ ngwi eyi naadi emi otseyi yagba okye ye ba kye d…î engwaf…î ikye?
ACT 15:11 Ei! Eyi noy…¦y…¦ gb…¦…¦ li mi elela mgbi Ots…¦ mgbi eyi iYesu ngwi a dulu eyi t…î, dafi ama kpaa a dulu ma t…î nani.>>
ACT 15:12 Okwakye na duu zumy…¦ le gad…î mbi iPol b…¦yi iBanabasi dafi a le nya ma odz…¦ ungw…î ama okwulewo b…¦yi amb…¦ ama ngwi Imgbasho ky…î yi Udzengye ny…¦ mbi ama mani.
ACT 15:13 On…î ngwi a ngy…¦ n…¦, iJ…¦nsi gb…îdz…¦ t…î gb…¦…¦: <<Engwunani, gad…î mbi ani na.
ACT 15:14 ISaim…în tsuutsa nya eyi dafi mi abab…î ma Imgbasho tso oweka mgban mi odulu Udzengye angbeka nu ma y…¦…¦ emidan mani.
ACT 15:15 Elodz…¦ mgbi ama ogb…¦…¦s…¦ kpaa kwokyi yi ungw…în…¦, dafi a l…î mi Af…¦ mani gb…¦…¦:
ACT 15:16 << <Ni ungw…în…¦ ny…¦ ani ka yid…î di yile esut…î mgbi iDevedi sis…¦. Ikpishi mgban ani ka yilen mb…¦, dika non dz…¦ mi odz…¦…¦dz…¦ mgban,
ACT 15:17 adzi ni inggis…¦ owamy…¦ ama nsisi duu pita Ots…¦, b…¦yi Udzengye ama ndz…¦ yi iyi mgbi ani duu, li ngha ngwi Ots…¦ nkyungw…î nton…¦n…¦ gb…î aali>
ACT 15:18 ungw…îna a teyi yen mi owita-wita mgbi …¦s…¦ majo.
ACT 15:19 <<Nghan…¦, ani le ngy…¦lu gb…¦…¦, ni eyi ka non y…¦…¦ okye mbi Udzengye ama nle kyata luba mbi Imgbasho ba.
ACT 15:20 Tatase ni eyi l…î ma af…¦, nya ma nu ma dulu ab…î mi ungwogye ngwi a kye fif…¦ nu angwula, mi amah idza, mi mmbw…¦ mmbwaba ngwi a tsili-tsili ma onbukw…î b…¦yi mi ali eyi duu.
ACT 15:21 Lubana a gb…î ola mgbi iMose mi ali ogalu on…î k…¦ di gb…în mi imbe okwakye mgbi emi iJuda ali egbe otonyewo duu.>>
ACT 15:22 Ta ama ogbikye iYesu yi engyukwo, b…¦yi okwakye mgbi emi iKrestu ol…îl…î duu, bwondu dulu emidama angbeka di d…î ma es…î lu Anti…îku yi iPol b…¦yi iBanabasi. A dulu iJuda (ngwi a li kwun gb…¦…¦ iBasaba) b…¦yi iSaila, inggis…¦ efa nton…¦ a nu ma mmw…¦ kpaakpaa mi idzidz…¦ mgbi ama onoy…¦y…¦.
ACT 15:23 A kye af…¦ nton…¦ d…î ma es…î a l…î mi ele gb…¦…¦: Ama ogbikye iYesu yi engyukwo, b…¦yi emi engwunema, d…¦s…î angba mbi ema Udzengye emi engwuneeyi mi Anti…îku, iSiria, b…¦yi iSilisia.
ACT 15:24 Eyi fwo gb…¦…¦ angbeka mbi eyi t…î mi oye-ye mgbi eyi ba di nu ema okakewo, nu ema is…î mi itukwu mi odz…¦ ngwi a gb…î mani.
ACT 15:25 Nghan…¦ eyi duu gbela odulu inggis…¦ angbeka yi emi okeyi ingblim…î iBanabasi yi iPol di d…î ma es…î mbi ema.
ACT 15:26 Inggis…¦ nton…¦ kye oshishe mgbi ama las…¦ mi ikye iyi mgbi Ots…¦ mgbi eyi iYesu iKrestu.
ACT 15:27 Nghawan…¦ eyi le d…î iJuda yi iSaila es…î nu ma ka ky…î obw…¦nd…¦ ongwi ondu mi ungw…î ngwi eyi le l…î nton…¦ni.
ACT 15:28 I kpa Onodzi Osaan b…¦yi eyi ombwo ema okye ngha ungw…î nton…¦ ba, sede li ama ndz…¦ ky…¦m…¦-ky…¦m…¦ n…¦ni.
ACT 15:29 Ema ka gye ungwogye ngwi a kye fif…¦ nu angwula ba, ungw…î eyeeyi ba, ema dika gye mmbw…¦ mmbwaba ngwi a tsili-tsili ma onbukw…î ba, di dulu ab…î mi amah idza. Kini ema kyungw…î nton…¦ bay…î, li ayin seali. K…¦ saan na.
ACT 15:30 Inggis…¦ ntona ky…¦…¦ oky…¦…¦ lu Anti…îku, ka kwu emi iKrestu kwakye mbonyi kye af…¦ ma nu ma.
ACT 15:31 Inggis…¦ ntona gb…î af…¦ nani ewo di sh…¦ta loma ikyesin…¦ li es…î okwu ma …¦w…¦wo.
ACT 15:32 IJuda yi iSaila, ama abuoma li oyegb…î, a gb…îdz…¦ kpakpa okwu ama onoy…¦y…¦ ntona …¦w…¦wo di yile ma dz…¦ of…¦.
ACT 15:33 Ngwi a kye egbe gwee mi ele n…¦, ama onoy…¦y…¦ ntona wo ma of…¦ mi iyu nu ma yid…î lu ka tu ama nd…î ma es…î mani.
ACT 15:34 (Nghaduukpaa iSaila y…î i kpan odz…¦ imbe nani.)
ACT 15:35 Kpaa iPol b…¦yi iBanabasi tila dz…¦ Anti…îku, n…¦ ama b…¦yi inggis…¦ angbeka kwuba tso diy…¦ gbees…î mgbi Ots…¦ mi ele.
ACT 15:36 I wa la gwee n…¦ iPol gb…î yi iBanabasi gb…¦…¦, <<Ba ni eyi y…¦ ka kpadi emi ongwuneyi mi ali igeli ngwi eyi gbees…î mgbi Ots…¦ mi ele duu, di di dafi a le ky…î mani.>>
ACT 15:37 I mina iBanabasi okye iJ…în, ngwu a di li kwun gb…¦…¦ iMaki na, waf…î yi ama,
ACT 15:38 kpaa iPol ts…¦w…¦ gb…¦…¦ li ayin ba okyon waf…î yi ama, ikyesin…¦ o tse dzamata mi iPamfyilia di nya okyid…î yi ama.
ACT 15:39 A dz…¦ yi angwodz…¦ fyumfye kpakpa yi ewoma n…¦man a gha oky…¦…¦. IBanabasi kyelu iMaki fooye lu iSapru,
ACT 15:40 nghaduu iPol dulu iSaila lu yan, ngwi a le lu n…¦, ama onoy…¦y…¦ kye ma wok…¦ iwulu ab…î mgbi Ots…¦.
ACT 15:41 O kyiky…¦ kpats…¦ iSiria b…¦yi iSilisia, le fyi okwakye mgbi emi iKrestu mfye itukwu.
ACT 16:1 IPol b…¦yi iSaila k…¦ iDebe, a di ny…¦ k…¦ iListra, imbe ngwi inggis…¦ onoy…¦y…¦ ngwu a li kwun di iTimoti dz…¦, On…în li emi iJuda di noy…¦y…¦. Nghaduu ots…în li emi iGriki.
ACT 16:2 Ama onoy…¦y…¦ mi iListra b…¦yi iKonu duu gb…îdz…¦ osuse ikpewo iTimoti.
ACT 16:3 Nghan…¦ i mina iPol okyon waf…î k…¦ agaba yan, ikyenghan…¦ o kyan iky…¦ ikye mgbi emi iJuda ama nto imbe na mani, ikyena ama duu ye gb…¦…¦ ots…în li emi iGriki.
ACT 16:4 Ngwi a le dzagaba mi igeli igeli ky…¦ n…¦, a kye ewodz…¦ ngwi ama ogbikye iYesu b…¦yi engyukwo emi iJerosalin kye bwalu ma, gb…î nya inggis…¦ ntona ikyegb…¦…¦ nu ma sunu mi ele.
ACT 16:5 Nghan…¦ ozu okwakye mgbi emi iKrestu duu fyumfye kpakpa mi oy…¦y…¦ onuunu dile mbwoombwo mi mmbwo mgbi ama alegbe-alegbe.
ACT 16:6 Akpe oka n…¦ iPol b…¦yi emidan dzagaba ny…¦ iFrijia b…¦yi iGalatia, ikyena Onodzi Osaan nya ma gb…¦…¦ nu ma ka yama gbees…î mi ay…¦s…¦ mgbi Asia ba.
ACT 16:7 Ngwi a wa to otsee iMisia n…¦, i mina ma okaka iBitinia, nghaduu Onodzi mgbi iYesu nu ma of…¦ nu ma kaka ba.
ACT 16:8 Nghan…¦ ta a si wikye ny…¦ ongwi iMisia lu iTroa.
ACT 16:9 Mi otu na iPol si di in…¦ odiidi. O di ongyul…î mi iMasidonia, le t…¦ky…¦ yan gb…¦…¦, <<Ba iMasidonia wa ya eyi ab…î.>>
ACT 16:10 Ngwi iPol di in…¦ odiidi ny…¦ n…¦, eyi si wewo akponyi lu iMasidonia. ikyeky…¦ eyi kyi kye gb…¦…¦, Imgbasho kwu eyi ela gb…¦…¦ ni eyi ka gb…î Es…î Osuse nya ma mi imbe nani.
ACT 16:11 Eyi kaka uwaa mi iTroa dz…¦kyo d…îk…¦ ibu iSamotre, tegblifan n…¦ eyi b…¦s…¦ mi iNiapoli.
ACT 16:12 Mi imbe na eyi lu iFyilipi, ogalu ongwi abab…î mi agw…î iMasidonia nbyidz…¦ abumfye mgbi iRoma nani; eyi la imbe na egbe ibyibyi.
ACT 16:13 Mi egbe otonyewo n…¦, eyi tas…¦ dzita onuf…¦ ogalu lu ondekyoo, imbe ngwi eyi ts…¦w…¦ gb…¦…¦ emi iJuda ka kwakye le bib…î mani. Eyi sis…¦ di wita ogb…îdz…¦ yi engyaa angbeka ama nkwakye mi imbe na mani.
ACT 16:14 Onyi mi idzidz…¦ ma nle fwo eyi ma li iLedia mi iTyatira, o li gbe angwuto ondl…¦ndl…¦ gya. O li sunu Imgbasho, n…¦ Ots…¦ Imgbasho kwulun itukwu non gbela odz…¦ ngwi iPol le gb…î mani.
ACT 16:15 Ngwi a ky…în iBatisima b…¦yi emidan duu n…¦, o b…î eyi gb…¦…¦ ni eyi ba udan. O gb…¦…¦, <<Ni ema kye ani gb…¦…¦ ani noy…¦y…¦ mbi Ots…¦ y…î, ba wa la ud…¦ ani na.>> O biib…¦ yi eyi, ta eyi si k…¦.
ACT 16:16 Egbe oka ngwi eyi le k…¦ imbe obib…î n…¦, eyi kpats…¦ yi ongwongyaa ofy…¦…¦ ngwu es…¦ d…în ikye di li ongye ogb…¦…¦s…¦. O li tseefa kwo awuya kpakpa nu emi otsid…în.
ACT 16:17 Ongwongyaa n…¦ ky…¦d…î iPol yi eyi le kwu-ela gb…¦…¦, <<Inggis…¦ nton…¦ li engbid…î mgbi Imgbasho onghaangha, a le nya ema of…¦ ngwi ema ka wat…î mani.>>
ACT 16:18 O kiyayi ogb…îdz…¦ n…¦ alegbe-alegbe, nghataa itukwu wa wulu iPol man o kyata nya onodzi obube nwodz…¦ mbon na gb…¦…¦, <<N wo abu ola mi iyi mgbi iYesu iKrestu tas…¦ mbon!>> Onodzi na si t…î dzanta mi on…î nani.
ACT 16:19 Ngwi emi otsid…î ofy…¦…¦ na difwi gb…¦…¦ of…¦ otu awuya mgbi ama tukwu n…¦, a si kpakli iPol yi iSaila kwo ma kp…¦…¦kp…¦…¦ lu ifyidu ka wo emi mfye ab…î.
ACT 16:20 A gbe ma ba mbi ama ogbiikw…î wa gb…¦…¦, <<Engyul…î nton…¦ li emi iJuda, a le ba yi okakewo mi igeli mgbi eyi kpakpa.
ACT 16:21 A tole tso alet…î nli ayin ba mbi eyi emi iRoma.>>
ACT 16:22 Ibyi si yaok…¦ oky…î eye yi iPol b…¦yi iSaila, ama ogbiikw…î kyi nghalu ma angwuto di noola gb…¦…¦ nu ma gbo ma ibe.
ACT 16:23 Ngwi a gbo ma ibe saan n…¦, a gbe ma wok…¦ obawi. A si wo ongye ongyoongyo na ola gb…¦…¦ no ngyo ma saan.
ACT 16:24 Ngwi a woola nghan…¦, inggis…¦ ongyo obawi na si gbe ma wok…¦ mi idzidz…¦ obawi di ta ma itse mi af…î.
ACT 16:25 Mi idzidz…¦ otu n…¦, iPol b…¦yi iSaila tole bib…î dile shashi mbi Imgbasho. Inggis…¦ angbeka mi ifu obawi tole fwo ma dafi a le shashi mani.
ACT 16:26 Ntunto n…¦, ikp…¦s…¦ suusu kpakpa man itozu mgbi obawi suusu. Onuf…¦ obawi duu kwulu akponyi, ta itse ngwi a ta ama nwoto obawi duu sh…¦.
ACT 16:27 Ngwi inggis…¦ ongyo obawi wa gbokyato n…¦ta, o dili onuf…¦ obawi tsatsa lato asisa, o si kye ngwalu okwusunkli mgban ikye ongw…î ewon, ikyeky…¦ o ts…¦w…¦ gb…¦…¦ emi obawi duu tse lu.
ACT 16:28 Hinin…¦ iPol fan ela gb…¦…¦, <<Ka yama ngw…î ewoo ba! Eyi duu ka todz…¦ aana!>>
ACT 16:29 Ongye ongyo obawi kwu ela ola si maama lu ifun ka gb…¦s…¦ lakiyayi iPol b…¦yi iSaila le shi adagba gbagbaagba.
ACT 16:30 O gbe ma tas…¦ wa byi ma gb…¦…¦, <<Engyukwo, li eky…¦ n ka ky…î ky…¦m…¦-ky…¦m…¦ se n ka wat…î?>>
ACT 16:31 A nyan gb…¦…¦, <<Nu oy…¦y…¦ mbi Ots…¦ iYesu ta abu ka tu owat…î-wat…î b…¦yi ud…¦ mgbi abu duu.>>
ACT 16:32 N…¦ta a si gb…î elodz…¦ mgbi Ots…¦ iYesu nyan b…¦yi ama nto udan duu.
ACT 16:33 Ngwi ka li otu mani, inggis…¦ ongyo obawi na gbe ma ka sa ma ifwa mi ewo tsatsadu; ntunto mata a si ky…în iBatisima b…¦yi emidan duu.
ACT 16:34 Inggis…¦ ongyo obawi na gbe ma t…î luba ud…¦ mgban wa nu ma ungwogye, o mbwo yi atsa, ikyeky…¦ o y…¦…¦ owa noy…¦y…¦ mbi Imgbasho, ongwu yi et…î mgban duu.
ACT 16:35 Ngwi egbe wa fa n…¦, ama ogbiikw…î d…î obaka mgbi ama es…î mbi inggis…¦ ongyo obawi na gb…¦…¦: <<Nu inggis…¦ ntona of…¦ nu ma lu.>>
ACT 16:36 Inggis…¦ ngyo obawi n…¦ si nya iPol gb…¦…¦, <<Ama ogbiikw…î ntona d…¦s…î gb…¦…¦ ni a dzita abu b…¦yi iSaila. On…¦n…¦ ema ka lu. Lu mi iyu na.>>
ACT 16:37 Nghaduu iPol nya obaka ntona gb…¦…¦: <<A gbo eyi ibe mi ododa ikw…î kpaa a yama fwo eyi ba, dafi eyi li emi iRoma n…¦ kpaa a di gbe eyi wo obawi. Nghama on…¦n…¦ a mina odzita eyi ni eyi lu ngha mgbanta imimaa? N fwa! Nya nu ma ba abuoma wa dulu eyi tas…¦.>>
ACT 16:38 Obaka nton…¦ si y…¦ lu ka nya ama ogbiikw…î ntona ngha, dafi a ka fwo gb…¦…¦ iPol yi iSaila li emi iRoma n…¦, imio wo ma.
ACT 16:39 A lukwu ma k…¦ obawi ka nu ma aba ogyeegye. A gbe ma tas…¦ wa t…¦ky…¦ nu ma gb…¦…¦ nu ma lu dzita ogalu mgbi ama.
ACT 16:40 Nghaduu iPol b…¦yi iSaila yid…î luba ud…¦ iLedia, mmana a wa tu ama onoy…¦y…¦ angbeka, a di kwu ma …¦w…¦ wo duuse a kwa lu dzita igeli nani.
ACT 17:1 Ngwi iPol b…¦yi emi okan dzagaba ka ny…¦ ongwi Amfipoli yi Apolonia n…¦, a wa to iTesalonika, imbe na ozu okwakye mgbi emi iJuda dz…¦ efu.
ACT 17:2 Dafi iPol teyi li ky…î mani, o ka kaka ozu okwakye mgbi emi iJuda, man si kponya yi ama mi Af…¦ mi egbe otonyewo nghi eta,
ACT 17:3 le nu ma osa diy…¦ le tso ma amb…¦ gb…¦…¦ iMedzaya ma ka gyadz…¦ ky…¦m…¦ di ky…¦…¦ mi ikwongye. O gb…¦…¦, <<IYesu ngwu ani le gb…îdzan nya ema n…¦ li iMedzaya mani.>>
ACT 17:4 Emi iJuda angbeka noy…¦y…¦ di y…¦…¦ ama oky…¦d…î iPol b…¦yi iSaila, dafi emi iGriki ibyibyi ama omio Imgbasho b…¦yi engyaa im…î angbeka kwuba kpaa ky…î mani.
ACT 17:5 Nghaduu emi iJuda angbeka kyoofu, nghan…¦ a kwu ama ondeye angbeka kwakye mi ifyidu, a y…¦…¦ ondu onyi man si wita eye mi ogalu nani. A tsinya ka kaka ud…¦ iJas…în le pita iPol b…¦yi iSaila ikye okye ma luba es…¦ wa nu ibyi inggis…¦.
ACT 17:6 Dafi a yama tu ma mi imbe na ba n…¦, a si kwo iJas…în yi ama onoy…¦y…¦ angbeka gbe ma k…¦ mbi engyukwo emi igeli, le kwu-ela gb…¦…¦: <<Inggis…¦ ama nle nu okakewo kpats…¦ …¦s…¦ duu n…¦, bato mm…¦n…¦ on…¦n…¦ni,
ACT 17:7 ma iJas…în gb…¦ ma kaka ud…¦ mgban. Ama duu tole foola ngwi iSidza wo, a tole gb…¦…¦ ut…î oka dz…¦ ngwu a li kwun di iYesu.>>
ACT 17:8 Ngwi a fwo odz…¦ n…¦ ngha n…¦, igeli duu y…¦…¦ yaaya.
ACT 17:9 Ta a nu iJas…în b…¦yi angbeka ntona kpaa udza ogb…¦-ab…î se nu ma lu.
ACT 17:10 Mi otu na ama onoy…¦y…¦ kye iPol b…¦yi iSaila d…¦s…î lu iB…¦ria. Ngwi a ka to imbe na n…¦, a kaka ozu okwakye mgbi emi iJuda.
ACT 17:11 Emi iB…¦ria dz…¦ yi ali osuse ngha emi iTesalonika, lubana a gb…¦ es…î na yi atsa kpakpa dile kya mi Af…¦ alegbe-alegbe ikye odi ni odz…¦ ngwi iPol gb…î na li otsitsi y…î.
ACT 17:12 Emi iJuda ibyibyi noy…¦y…¦, dafi ibyi engyaa im…î emi iGriki b…¦yi engyul…î kpaa ky…î nani.
ACT 17:13 Nghaduu ngwi emi iJuda angbeka mi iTesalonika kwamb…¦ gb…¦…¦ iPol le gb…î elodz…¦ Imgbasho mi iB…¦ria n…¦, a l…î k…¦ imbe na ka teeye.
ACT 17:14 N…¦ ama onoy…¦y…¦ byakpa kye iPol d…¦s…î lu ondiiga, kpaa iSaila b…¦yi iTimoti tila mi iB…¦ria.
ACT 17:15 Ama nwaf…î b…¦yi iPol ntona tawon nghataa k…¦ At…¦n, n…¦ a si yid…î lu iB…¦ria yi es…î mbi iSaila b…¦yi iTimoti gb…¦…¦ nu ma vla-vla ka tun.
ACT 17:16 Ngwi iPol kale dz…¦giyi ma mi At…¦n n…¦, eka kwowina lon kpakpa mi ikye angwula ama ngbiimbe mi ifu ogalu nani.
ACT 17:17 Nghan…¦ o li kponya yi emi iJuda b…¦yi emi iGriki ama omio Imgbasho mi ozu okwakye mgbi emi iJuda, b…¦yi inggis…¦ ama ngwu o tu ma mi ifyidu kpaa alegbe-alegbe.
ACT 17:18 IPol kaka angw…¦ ota-ta yi obyi etsetse angbeka ngwu a li kwu ma gb…¦…¦ Epikuria yi iSt…îki a li inggis…¦ ama ots…¦wodz…¦ kpakpa. Angbeka mi ele byita gb…¦…¦, <<Li ali odz…¦ ngwi inggis…¦ ntso gb…¦…¦ ongwu ye ngha duu n…¦ le mina ogb…î?>> Angbeka gb…¦…¦, <<Dz…¦ dafi o le gb…îdz…¦ Imgbasho ongwi anengye mani.>> A gb…îdz…¦ n…¦ ngha ikyeky…¦ iPol le gb…î Es…î Osuse mi odz…¦ mgbi iYesu b…¦yi oky…¦…¦-ky…¦…¦ mgban mi ikwu.
ACT 17:19 N…¦ a kyon k…¦ okwakye mgbi Ariopagu, mmana ma a byun gb…¦…¦, <<Ni eyi ye li ali otsootso ofuf…¦ ngwi abu le tso ky…¦ d…¦n?
ACT 17:20 Abu le kye odz…¦ angbeka ama nfyi eyi mfye ofwoofwo kpakpa ba, nghan…¦ eyi mina oye itan.>>
ACT 17:21 (Emi At…¦n yi ingyoga mgbi ama ngwu lato yi ama duu, li kye on…î oky…î nkonyonyi wuba, kpaa a li le gb…îdz…¦ di gad…î mi odz…¦ ama ofuf…¦.)
ACT 17:22 N…¦ta iPol kyato dz…¦kiyayi okwakye mgbi emi Ariopago si gb…¦…¦: <<Ema emi At…¦n! N difwi gb…¦…¦ ema li sunu Imgbasho angbeka saan mi ali it…î of…¦ duu.
ACT 17:23 Ikyena n kyiky…¦ wodi agw…î mgbi ema, n di ungw…î ama ngwi ema le sunu ma mani, n di iwashi oka a l…î ungw…î mi efu gb…¦…¦; Ikyenghan…¦ ungw…î ngwi ema tole sunun dafi Imgbasho ngwu a yen ba na, n ka gb…îdzan nya ema.
ACT 17:24 <<Imgbasho n…¦ li ongwu ta …¦s…¦ b…¦yi alungw…î ama nto efu duu na, li Ots…¦ mgbi esho yi es…¦, o li yama la ozu ngwi a mb…¦ mi ab…î ba.
ACT 17:25 O mina unkonyi mi ab…î mgbi inggis…¦ owamy…¦ ba, ikyeky…¦ i won yi unka ba, lubana li ongwu abuon li nu ali inggis…¦ oshishe yi mmy…¦ b…¦yi ungw…î angbeka duu aali.
ACT 17:26 Ikpewo inggis…¦ onyi Imgbasho ta inggis…¦ ama nto …¦s…¦ tsatsadu, ikyegb…¦…¦ …¦s…¦ duu no li mgbi ama; li ongwu di kye on…î dz…¦ ali inggis…¦ duu b…¦yi imbe ngwi a ka dz…¦ y…¦y…¦ mani.
ACT 17:27 Imgbasho kyungw…în…¦ ngha ikye ni inggis…¦ ye ongwu, pita ongwu di tu ongwu, nghaduu o dz…¦ mbotunto yi eyi ba.
ACT 17:28 <Lubana li mbon ngwi eyi dz…¦ oshishe di li kyiky…¦ ky…¦ di dz…¦ mi odz…¦…¦dz…¦ mgbi eyi.> Dafi ama ol…î ungw…î mgbi abu angbeka gb…î mani gb…¦…¦, <Eyi li et…î mgban.>
ACT 17:29 <<Nghan…¦ dafi eyi li et…î mgbi Imgbasho n…¦, ni eyi ka ts…¦w…¦ gb…¦…¦ odz…¦…¦dz…¦ mgban dz…¦ dafi abashi naadi iyudza onzundz…¦ okw…îkw…î hona ikwuts…¦ naadi ungw…î okpaakpa ngwi inggis…¦ kpa mi ozoyeye mgban ba.
ACT 17:30 Tugbe ma Imgbasho kye ad…î onghaangha it…î n…¦ wuuta ba, kpaa on…¦n…¦ y…î o woola gb…¦…¦ ni ali inggis…¦ mi ali imbe duu kyatitukwu mi of…¦ obube mgbi ama.
ACT 17:31 Lubana o kye egbe dz…¦ ngwi o ka wa fwo …¦s…¦ duu ikw…î mi otsitsi mi ab…î mgbi iYesu ngwu o tsekise dulu nani. Imgbasho tsekise tso obw…¦nd…¦ n…¦ mbi ali inggis…¦ duu mi okyile iYesu mi ikwu.>>
ACT 17:32 On…î ngwi a fwo iPol gb…îdz…¦ mgbi oky…¦…¦-ky…¦…¦ mi ikwu n…¦, angbeka shan isha, kpaa angbeka gb…¦…¦, <<I mina eyi odi fwo abu mi it…îdz…¦ n…¦ onoka.>>
ACT 17:33 Ngwi a gb…îdz…¦ n…¦ mata, iPol si lu dzata okwakye.
ACT 17:34 Nghaduu inggis…¦ angbeka gbela ky…¦d…î iPol di y…¦…¦ ama onoy…¦y…¦. Onyi mi idzidz…¦ mgbi ama li iDi…înasu, inggis…¦ mi okwakye mgbi Ariopago, b…¦yi iwata ngwu iyin di iDamari b…¦yi angbeka kwuba.
ACT 18:1 Ngwi ungw…în…¦ ny…¦ n…¦, iPol dzita At…¦n lu iKorinti.
ACT 18:2 Li mmana ngwi o tu inggis…¦ iJuda ngwu a li kwu iyin di Akwila, o li inggis…¦ mi iPontu, o kwa ky…¦ mi Itali yi owan iPrisila on…î k…¦ waba, ikyeky…¦ ut…î iKladi…îsu woola gb…¦…¦ emi iJuda duu nu ma dzita iRoma. N…¦ iPol si k…¦ oka di ma,
ACT 18:3 ma ikyegb…¦…¦ ongwu kpaa li inggis…¦ otuo opo dafi ama kpaa li tuo n…¦, o tila dz…¦ le kyid…î yi ama.
ACT 18:4 Alegbe otonyewo duu o li ka kaka ozu okwakye mgbi emi iJuda, le fya ikye ni ongwu kyata emi iJuda b…¦yi emi iGriki itukwu.
ACT 18:5 On…î ngwi iSaila b…¦yi iTimoti yid…î mi iMasidonia n…¦, iPol kyelu on…î mgban duu nu mi es…î ogb…î…îgb…î di ky…î obw…¦nd…¦ mbi emi iJuda gb…¦…¦, <<IYesu li iMedzaya mani.
ACT 18:6 Kpaa ngwi emi iJuda gbela yi iPol wuba yid…î le fyan ito n…¦, o gbo angwuto mgban otso ma gb…¦…¦ di a le tangw…¦ Imgbasho di nya ma gb…¦…¦, <<Eyi mgbi ema no dikye ema! Ani y…î, ani kyid…î mgbi ani saan. Wita on…¦n…¦ lu iyayi n le lu ka gbees…î nya Udzengye.>>
ACT 18:7 N…¦ iPol si dzita ozu okwakye mgbi emi iJuda lu ud…¦ nwatse d…în mani, ud…¦ iTaitusu iJ…îstusu ongwu nli Udzengye li sunu Imgbasho nani.
ACT 18:8 IKrispu, ongyukwo mi ozu okwakye mgbi emi iJuda, b…¦yi et…î mgban ol…îl…î duu noy…¦y…¦ mbi Ots…¦ iYesu; b…¦yi emi iKorinti gwuba ama nfwo iPol noy…¦y…¦ a di ky…î ma iBatisima.
ACT 18:9 Otu oka ma, Ots…¦ iYesu gb…îdz…¦ yi iPol mi in…¦ odiidi gb…¦…¦, <<Ka yama wo imio ba; kiyayi ogb…î…îgb…î, dika tukwondu ba.
ACT 18:10 Ikyesin…¦ n dz…¦ b…¦yi abu, ma inggis…¦ onyonyi ka yama dz…¦ abu wo di ky…î abu ibli ba, ikyeky…¦ ani to yi inggis…¦ kwuba mi ogalu n…¦ni.>>
ACT 18:11 Nghan…¦ iPol la imbe na onova onyi yi ofyia egyin le tso ma elodz…¦ Imgbasho.
ACT 18:12 Nghaduu on…î ngwi iGalio gye iG…îna mgbi Akaya ma, emi iJuda dz…¦ iPol wo bwan kyon lu opiikw…î.
ACT 18:13 A gb…¦…¦, <<Ongyul…î n…¦, le fya okyata inggis…¦ nu ma sunu Imgbasho mi of…¦ ngwi ola mgbi eyi gbela ba.>>
ACT 18:14 Ngwi iPol kwa wewo ogb…îdz…¦ n…¦, iGalio nya emi iJuda gb…¦…¦, <<Ni ema emi iJuda kile kwondukw…î mi ungw…î obube hona alobube ntimbi kpakpa y…î, n kika yagba kyungw…î mi efu.
ACT 18:15 Kpaa ngwi i y…¦…¦ angwodz…¦ mi ikye odz…¦ ogb…î…îgb…î yi iyi, b…¦yi ola mgbi ema n…¦, yile odz…¦ mgbi ema m…¦ abuema na. N ka yama wo ab…î mi it…î ntona ba.>>
ACT 18:16 N…¦man o l…î ma onya tas…¦ mi ozu ikw…î.
ACT 18:17 Ta ama duu kpakli iS…îst…¦n…¦ nkye ozu okwakye mgbi emi iJuda teyi mani di gbon mi iyayi opiikw…î. Nghaduu iGalio gbin…¦ ngwuta i kakan ewo ba.
ACT 18:18 IPol la iKorinti egbe ibyibyi. Ta o dzita ama onoy…¦y…¦, kye ikye d…î ony…¦ ongwi eni lu iSiria. O waf…î yi iPrisila yi oban Akwila. Duuse non lu y…î, o ny…¦ wul…î otu mi iS…¦nkria, ikye ombwo ondu odz…¦…¦dz…¦ ngwi o dz…¦ mani.
ACT 18:19 A ka kaka Efesu, man iPol dzita iPrisila b…¦yi Akwila. Ongwu ab…în kaka ozu okwakye mgbi emi iJuda ka kponya yi ama.
ACT 18:20 Ngwi a nyan gb…¦…¦ no la yi ama kpakpa n…¦, o fwa.
ACT 18:21 Ngwi o ka lu n…¦, o zondu gb…¦…¦, <<N ka yid…î ba mbi ema, ni li oweka mgbi Imgbasho y…î.>> N…¦ta o si kaka uwaa lu dzata Efesu.
ACT 18:22 Ngwi o kaka iSisiria n…¦, o ka ta emi iKrestu angba di ny…¦ lu Anti…îku.
ACT 18:23 Dafi o la Anti…îku kye egbe gwee n…¦, iPol kyato mi imbe na dzagaba k…¦ imbe idzidza-dzidza kpats…¦ ay…¦s…¦ iGalatia b…¦yi iFrijia, le kwu ama onoy…¦y…¦ …¦w…¦ wo.
ACT 18:24 Nghan…¦ inggis…¦ iJuda ngwu iyin di Apolo, ngwu a mban mi ogalu Alekdzandra ba Efesu. O li ongyul…î ngwu kpayi af…¦, di dz…¦ yi ozoyeye mgbi Ibyibyilo saan.
ACT 18:25 A tson Of…¦ mgbi Ots…¦, ngwi o le fu mi onodzi n…¦, o gb…îdz…¦ di tso odz…¦ mgbi iYesu mi itukwu onyi, nghaduu o ye odz…¦ iBatisima mgbi iJ…în kyoon ta.
ACT 18:26 O si wita odz…¦ ogb…î…îgb…î yi ab…î otsig…¦g…¦ mi ozu okwakye mgbi emi iJuda. Ngwi iPrisila b…¦yi Akwila fwon n…¦, a kyon lu ud…¦ ama ka nun osa mi Of…¦ mgbi Ots…¦ saan.
ACT 18:27 On…î ngwi i wa wo Apolo ok…¦ Akaya n…¦, ama onoy…¦y…¦ fyonmfye itukwu, di l…î af…¦ mbi ama oky…¦d…î mi imbe na gb…¦…¦ nu ma gban ab…î efa. Okakaakaka mgban ma, o dz…¦ yi ab…î oyaaya mbi ama Imgbasho nu ma noy…¦y…¦ mi elela mgban mani.
ACT 18:28 Ikyena o tangwodz…¦ yi emi iJuda kp…îkl…î…î di ngha ma mi ododa, tso ma amb…¦ mi Af…¦ saan gb…¦…¦ iYesu li iMedzaya.
ACT 19:1 Ngwi Apolo ka dz…¦ iKorinti n…¦, iPol ny…¦ ongwi af…¦…¦s…¦ wa kaka Efesu. Mmanana o tu ama onoy…¦y…¦ angbeka
ACT 19:2 di byi ma gb…¦…¦, <<Ema gb…¦ Onodzi Osaan on…î ngwi ema noy…¦y…¦ ma w…¦?>> A gb…¦…¦, <<Ei, eyi fwo kpaa gb…¦…¦ Onodzi Osaan dz…¦ ma ba.>>
ACT 19:3 N…¦ iPol byi ma gb…¦…¦, <<Nghama li ali it…î iBatisima ngwi a ky…î ema?>> A nu uka gb…¦…¦, <<IBatisima mgbi iJ…în.>>
ACT 19:4 IPol si gb…îgb…¦…¦, <<IBatisima mgbi iJ…în li iBatisima itukwu okyata-kyata. IJ…în nya inggis…¦ ntona gb…¦…¦ nu ma noy…¦y…¦ mbi ongwu nka wa ba mi iyikpa ongwu mani, li iYesu waali.>>
ACT 19:5 Ngwi a fwo odz…¦ n…¦ n…¦, a ky…î ma iBatisima mi iyi mgbi Ots…¦ iYesu.
ACT 19:6 Dafi iPol kye ab…î d…î ma ikye n…¦, Onodzi Osaan kaka mboma, a si gb…î ondudz…¦ angbeka di yegb…î.
ACT 19:7 Mmbwo mgbi ama duu m…¦ iwyodefa.
ACT 19:8 IPol kaka ozu okwakye mgbi emi iJuda di gb…îdz…¦ yi ama mi ododa nghataa ofyia eta, le tangwodz…¦ di biib…¦ yi ama mi ikye odz…¦ esut…î mgbi Imgbasho.
ACT 19:9 Nghaduu angbeka mi ifu ma fyumfye ikye di fwa onoy…¦y…¦, di kwu Of…¦ mgbi Ots…¦ fyito mi ododa. N…¦ iPol dzita ma di kyi gbelu ama onoy…¦y…¦ ntona waf…î biyan lu kale tso ma alegbe mi ozu otsuungw…î mgbi iTiranu.
ACT 19:10 Ungw…în…¦ kiyayi m…¦ onova efa, nghataa emi iJuda b…¦yi emi iGriki ama nto ay…¦s…¦ mgbi Asia duu fwo elodz…¦ mgbi Ots…¦.
ACT 19:11 Imgbasho ny…¦ ikpewo iPol kyungw…î ama okwulewo,
ACT 19:12 Nghan…¦ gbaka ayangwuto ofw…î in…¦ b…¦yi ishisha angwuto ngwi a kye gbo iPol ewo kpaa, ni a kye k…¦ ni emi ootse kye ab…î gbo efu ootse mgbi ama li ngy…¦ onodzi ibwubwe kpaa li t…î dzamata.
ACT 19:13 Emi iJuda angbeka ama ntole gaaga tsili ky…¦ le l…î onodzi ibwubwe onya, a fya okwu mi iyi mgbi Ots…¦ iYesu mi ikye ama ngwu es…¦ d…î ma ikye gb…¦…¦ ni es…¦ t…î lu. A le gb…îgb…¦…¦, <<Mi iyi iYesu, ongwu iPol li le gbees…î mgban na, tas…¦ lu na.>>
ACT 19:14 Emi ongw…¦ iSkeva, ongyukwo inggis…¦ ofif…¦ mgbi emi iJuda, nghi egyafa, tole kyungw…în…¦ni.
ACT 19:15 Egbe oka n…¦ onodzi ibwubwe nu ma uka gb…¦…¦, <<iYesu ani yen, iPol kpaa ani ye odzan, nghama ema li ele?>>
ACT 19:16 Nghan…¦ inggis…¦ ndz…¦ yi onodzi obube bulu gy…¦ ma di ngha ma yi mfye. O sulu ma onikyibe, a si tsinya dzata ud…¦ mgban ibiba yi eyi mi ewo.
ACT 19:17 On…î ngwi emi iJuda b…¦yi emi iGriki nto Efesu wa ye ungw…în…¦ n…¦, imio wo ma, ta iyi mgbi Ots…¦ iYesu si gye mmw…¦ kpakpa.
ACT 19:18 Ibyi inggis…¦ ama nnoy…¦y…¦ t…î ba mi ododa wa fwi ali ibwubwe ngwi ama ky…î mani.
ACT 19:19 Inggis…¦ ibyibyi ama oky…î obudei, gbe af…¦ ofulu-fulu mgbi ama kwakye gbe toola mi in…¦ ibyi inggis…¦. Ngwi a kyi gb…îlu mmya mgbi umbwo af…¦ ntona n…¦, i m…¦ iDracama idubu ngwusefa d…în iwyo.
ACT 19:20 Mi it…î of…¦ n…¦ elodz…¦ mgbi Ots…¦ gb…îfw…¦ di nghao fyumfye.
ACT 19:21 Ngwi ungw…î nton…¦ duu ky…î ny…¦ n…¦, iPol wewo olu iJerosalin, o ny…¦ ongwi iMasidonia b…¦yi Acaya. O gb…¦…¦, <<Ni ani ka kaka iJerosalin y…î, n ka k…¦ iRoma kpaa ky…¦m…¦-ky…¦m…¦.>>
ACT 19:22 O d…î ama okyid…î biyan nghi efa, iTimoti b…¦yi Erastu, k…¦ iMasidonia, ongwu y…î tila dz…¦ mi ay…¦s…¦ mgbi Asia ongwon…î gwee se.
ACT 19:23 Mi it…în…î na onikyeeye gboky…¦…¦ mi ikye Of…¦ mgbi Ots…¦ iYesu.
ACT 19:24 Inggis…¦ onda iyudza onzundz…¦ okw…îkw…î, iyin gb…¦…¦ iDemetri…î, li ongwu m…¦ ozoka Atemi, ungw…în…¦ li nu ma awuya ongy…¦…¦ngy…¦ ba, li mmya ongbungb…¦ ba mbi ama onduufa.
ACT 19:25 O kwu ama onduufa kwakye, b…¦yi ama ndz…¦ mi it…î of…¦ id…î pita li ungwonyi mani, si gb…¦…¦: <<Engyul…î, ema ye li mi idab…î n…¦ ngwi eyi li tu aludu mgbi eyi.
ACT 19:26 Ema di diy…¦ fwo, dafi iPol biib…¦ yi ibyi inggis…¦ mi Efesu mm…¦n…¦ni wo ma …¦nd…¦, sisi gwee ki li ay…¦s…¦ mgbi Asia duu. O gb…¦…¦ Imgbasho ama ngwu inggis…¦ m…¦ ma m…¦…¦m…¦ mi ab…î nton…¦ duu, a yama li Imgbasho ba dududu.
ACT 19:27 Odz…¦ obube dz…¦ ana, yama li idab…î mgbi eyi n…¦ta ngwi iyi mgban osuse ka byulu ba, kpaa ozoka mgbi imgbasho ongyaa oshewo Atemi kpaa ka y…¦…¦ ungw…î onyadi, ongwu imgbasho ongyaa ab…în ngwu a li sunun kpats…¦ ay…¦s…¦ Asia yi …¦s…¦ ol…îl…î duu na, a ka kye bulu ugabaidu mgban oshewo nani.>>
ACT 19:28 Ngwi a fwo ungw…în…¦ n…¦, itukwu gyaabyi loma man a wita owulu gb…¦…¦: <<Oshewo li Atemi mgbi emi Efesu!>>
ACT 19:29 Lab…îlab…î n…¦ta igeli y…¦…¦ on…îgb…¦-on…îgb…¦. Inggis…¦ ntona kye bwalu iGay…îsu b…¦yi Aristak…î, ongwu li ongw…¦ afoky…¦…¦ mgbi iPol ky…¦ mi iMasidonia, a si waf…î ondonyi dafi a li inggis…¦ onyi mani kaka imbe okwakye okwukwo.
ACT 19:30 IPol mina okye ewon t…î iyayi ibyi inggis…¦, kpaa ama oky…¦d…î gbelon ba.
ACT 19:31 Engyukwo emi id…î angbeka mi ay…¦s…¦ na, ama nli oka iPol d…¦s…î t…¦ky…¦ nun gb…¦…¦ non ka yama l…¦l…¦ kye ewon k…¦ imbe okwakye okwukwo na ba.
ACT 19:32 Okwakye w…¦nd…¦. Angbeka tole wulu mi it…îdz…¦ oka angbeka mi it…îdz…¦ idzidza. Angbeka ye it…îdz…¦ nkye ma k…¦dz…¦ imbe na ba.
ACT 19:33 Emi iJuda tsamu Alekidzanda dz…¦kiyayi ibyi inggis…¦ man angbeka mi ibyi inggis…¦ tole nyan odz…¦ ngwi o ka gb…î mani. O si ky…î ma ab…î gb…¦…¦ nu ma dz…¦ shilididi ikye ni ongwu natsondu onagb…¦ ewon, mi inai ma.
ACT 19:34 Ngwi a wa difwi gb…¦…¦ o li emi iJuda n…¦, ama duu wulu ondonyi m…¦ dafi obyi efa hini gb…¦…¦: <<Oshewo li Atemi mgbi emi Efesu!>>
ACT 19:35 Ongye ol…î…îl…î mgbi ogalu okwukwo tukwu ma ondu, o nya ibyi inggis…¦ gb…¦…¦: <<Ema emi Efesu, li em…¦ mi …¦s…¦ ye gb…¦…¦ igeli mgbi Efesu li ogalu osunu angbodzi Imgbasho ongyaa Atemi ba di ye dafi onodzi mgban, nngwuta ky…¦ esho ma dz…¦ imbe n…¦ ba?
ACT 19:36 Nghan…¦, dafi a ka tangw…¦ otsitsi n…¦ gb…¦ ba n…¦, li ayin ni ema yile itukwu b…¦s…¦ di ky…î unkonyi mi ikwangha ba.
ACT 19:37 Ema gbe engyul…î nton…¦ ba mm…¦n…¦, nghaduu a yama yi ozoka unkonyi hona kwu ashu mgbi eyi shany…¦ ba.
ACT 19:38 Nghan…¦, kini iDemetri…î b…¦yi ama okyidab…î yan dz…¦ yi okakewo yi inggis…¦ y…î, opiikw…î lasisa, emi ola kpaa to. Nu ma ka kwelikw…î mmanani.
ACT 19:39 Nghaduu ni odz…¦ ka dz…¦ma ngwi ema mina okye ba y…î, li ky…¦m…¦ ni a kye m…¦lu mi okwakye ndz…¦ mi ola mani.
ACT 19:40 Dafi i dz…¦ nghan…¦, ungw…î nky…î in…¦ n…¦ a ka yagba maayi b…¦ eyi gb…¦…¦ di li eyi teeye. Eyi ka yagba tangw…¦ mi ikye on…îgb…¦ n…¦ naadi nu it…îdz…¦ nka m…¦ ba.>>
ACT 19:41 Ngwi o gb…îdz…¦ n…¦ ngy…¦ mata, o si nu okwakye ganya.
ACT 20:1 On…î ngwi eye wa ngy…¦ n…¦, iPol d…¦s…î mbi ama onoy…¦y…¦, ngwi o fyuma mfye itukwu n…¦, o nya ma gb…¦…¦ se egbe oka man kye of…¦ dikye lu iMasidonia.
ACT 20:2 O si dzagaba ny…¦ imbe nani, o nya ma elodz…¦ kpakpa ofyuma mfye itukwu, mi ol…¦l…¦ n…¦ o ka kaka iGriki,
ACT 20:3 o la imbe na ofyia eta. Ikyeky…¦ emi iJuda wibu oky…în ungw…î obube dafi o wewo okaka uwaa lu iSiria mani, n…¦ o kyatitukwu yid…î wikye ka ny…¦ ongwi iMasidonia.
ACT 20:4 Ama ntawon li iSopata ongw…¦ iPerusu ngwu ky…¦ mi iB…¦ria, Aristak…î b…¦yi iSekundu yi iGay…îsu emi iTesalonika, mi iDebe, iTimoti kpaa, yi iTacik…î b…¦yi iTrofimu mi ay…¦s…¦ mgbi Asia.
ACT 20:5 Inggis…¦ nton…¦ wikye lu ka dz…¦ giyi eyi mi iTroa.
ACT 20:6 Nghaduu ngwi oga ibredi ongwi a kye okwuna wo efu ba wa ny…¦ n…¦, eyi kaka uwaa mi iFyilipi kye egbe eda duuse kwa lu ka tu angbeka ntona mi iTroa, eyi la ele ikyidu ol…îl…î.
ACT 20:7 Egbe ongwi abab…î mi ikyidu ma eyi kwakye ikye ogye oga. IPol gb…îdz…¦ yi ama, ma ikyegb…¦…¦ o weka olu tegblifan n…¦, o kiyayi yi onya okpaaakpaa yi ama nghataa otu gheefa.
ACT 20:8 A gbe ola ipitila d…îto mi ifoozu ongwi esho imbe ngwi eyi kwakye mani.
ACT 20:9 Ongwongyul…î mmafa ngwu a li kwun di iYutuku s…îdz…¦ of…¦ awo le mwuna. Dafi iPol kale kiyayi yi odz…¦ ogb…î…îgb…î n…¦, una wa ngw…în lu kpini, o si gb…¦s…¦ ky…¦ esho wa zud…îwok…¦ es…¦ man a ka kyon ikwukw…î tatso.
ACT 20:10 Nghaduu iPol tashulu luba es…¦, o tukwuk…¦ ikw…î nani ts…¦kwulun. O si nya ma gb…¦…¦, <<Ka yama teeyi ba na, o dz…¦ oshishe!>>
ACT 20:11 Ta o diy…¦ t…îk…¦ lu esho kye ghalu ibredi gye yi ama. Ngwi o gb…îdz…¦ yi ama nghataa ni egbe fa n…¦man, o si lu.
ACT 20:12 Inggis…¦ ntona si kyi kyelu ongwongyul…î mmafa n…¦ lu ud…¦ oshishe itukwu di fyuma mfye kpakpa.
ACT 20:13 IPol nya eyi gb…¦…¦ ni eyi ny…¦ ongwi uwaa teyi ongwu lu Aso, ka kye ongwu mi imbe nani, ikyesin…¦ o le lu imbe na mi af…¦…¦s…¦.
ACT 20:14 Ngwi o tu eyi mi Aso ma, eyi kyon wo uwaa lu iMitilene.
ACT 20:15 Tegblifan ma, eyi dzata imbe na dz…¦kyo wa to kw…¦kw…¦ yi ibu iKio. Egbe oka n…¦ eyi dz…¦kyo d…îk…¦ ibu iSamosi, di kaka iMiletu tegblifan.
ACT 20:16 IPol di wewo nu ma fan ny…¦ ongwi eni lu dzata Efesu, ikye ombe on…î mi ay…¦s…¦ mgbi Asia wuba, lubana i won okaka iJerosalin pl…¦, duuse ni oga iP…¦ntik…îsu wa gy…î.
ACT 20:17 Mi iMiletu ma, iPol d…¦s…î k…¦ Efesu ikye engyukwo emi iKrestu gb…¦…¦ nu ma ba wa tu ongwu.
ACT 20:18 Ngwi a wa kaka n…¦, o gb…î yi ama gb…¦…¦: <<Ema ye odz…¦…¦dz…¦ ngwi ani dz…¦ mi on…î ngwi ani dz…¦ yi ema ma duu, wita mi egbe ongwi abab…î ngwi ani ba …¦s…¦ Asia mani.
ACT 20:19 N ky…î Ots…¦ id…î mi ewo oyile es…¦ b…¦yi etse in…¦. N di shitukwu mi ali imbadi yi is…î ngwi emi iJuda wibu ani mi ele duu.
ACT 20:20 Ema ye n yama y…¦yikpa ogb…î ungw…î ndz…¦ yi oyab…î nya ema mi ododa ba, mi ud…¦ ema hona mbi ibyi inggis…¦ kpaa.
ACT 20:21 Ani gb…î nya emi iJuda b…¦yi emi iGriki gb…¦…¦ li ky…¦m…¦ nu ma kyatitukwu luba mbi Imgbasho di dz…¦ yi oy…¦y…¦ onuunu mbi Ots…¦ mgbi eyi iYesu.
ACT 20:22 <<Nghan…¦ on…¦n…¦, Onodzi Osaan si ani le lu iJerosalin, nghaduu n yama ye ungw…î nka kiyayi y…¦n mi imbe na ba.
ACT 20:23 Kpaa ungw…î ngwi ani ye li onyi ta, ali ogalu ngwi ani kaka efu duu, Onodzi Osaan li le kwen ad…î gb…¦…¦ obawi b…¦yi adz…¦ ogyeegye dz…¦ ani es…¦ ma.
ACT 20:24 Nghaduukpaa n kye oshishe mgb…¦n gb…¦…¦ li unkonyi ba, ni ani ki yagba ngy…¦lu onya otse-tse b…¦yi id…î ngwi Ots…¦ iYesu kye wo ani ab…î n…¦ kpata id…î oky…î obw…¦nd…¦ mi Es…î Osuse mgbi elela mgbi Imgbasho n…¦ni.
ACT 20:25 <<On…¦n…¦, n ye ta gb…¦…¦ inggis…¦ onyonyi mi idzidz…¦ ema ngwu ani gbees…î esut…î mgbi Imgbasho nyan, ka yama di ani wuba.
ACT 20:26 Nghan…¦, n le nya ema mi ododa on…îngwun…¦ gb…¦…¦, n yama dz…¦ yi obube mi odzili-dzili mgbi inggis…¦ onyonyi ba.
ACT 20:27 Lubana ani fwijiwo onya ema oweka mgbi Imgbasho duu ba.
ACT 20:28 Gb…¦w…¦dz…¦ ewema b…¦yi ifyungw…î ama Onodzi Osaan gbe wo ema ab…î gb…¦…¦ ni ema le di mboma mani. Li inggis…¦ ama ongyo emi iKrestu mgbi Ots…¦, ngwu ongwu gyaagya yi eyi mgban nton…¦ni.
ACT 20:29 Ani ye ta gb…¦…¦ ni ani wa dzita imbe n…¦ y…î, emi idukwl…¦b…¦ ibwubwe, ka ba idzidz…¦ ema a ka yama dzita ifyungw…î ba.
ACT 20:30 Mi idzidz…¦ ema kpaa, angbeka ka t…î nka kyata otsitsi, ikye otu ama oky…¦d…î ma.
ACT 20:31 Nghan…¦ gb…¦w…¦byi na! W…¦ na gb…¦…¦ mi onova eta n yama kwul…¦s…¦ okwo ali inggis…¦ mgbi ema ad…î mi otu yi on…î yi etse in…¦ ba.
ACT 20:32 On…¦n…¦ n kye ema d…î Imgbasho ub…î yi es…î mgbi elelan, nka nu ema she di nu ema okwud…¦ mi idzidz…¦ ama ngwu a kye ma kyi salu duu.
ACT 20:33 N yama mina iyudza onzundz…¦ hona abashi naadi angwuto mgbi inggis…¦ onyi ba.
ACT 20:34 Ema abuema duu ye gb…¦…¦ ab…î mgbi ani nton…¦ nu ani ungw…î ngwi ani mina tsatsadu b…¦yi imina mgbi ama oky…¦ yi ani kpaa.
ACT 20:35 Alungw…î ani ky…î duu, ani tso ema dafi mi it…î id…î okwunewo n…¦ eyi ka ya emi abub…î yi emi ootse ab…î ky…¦m…¦-ky…¦m…¦, ole w…¦ elodz…¦ ama ngwi Ots…¦ iYesu abuon gb…î mani gb…¦…¦: <Mse dz…¦ mi onuunu ngha ogb…¦-gb…¦.> >>
ACT 20:36 Ngwi iPol gb…îdz…¦ n…¦ ngy…¦ n…¦, o si gbe akwaf…î kw…¦s…¦ yi ama duu bib…î.
ACT 20:37 N…¦ta ama duu si ny…¦ yi ikwu otseetse, a ts…¦kwulun di nyan gb…¦…¦ se egbe oka yi okpitukwu.
ACT 20:38 Ungw…î nnghao nu eka kpl…îk…î lo ma y…î, li elodz…¦ ngwi o gb…¦…¦ a ka yama di ongwu wuba nani. Taman a si tawon ka kaka uwaa.
ACT 21:1 Ngwi o nya ma gb…¦…¦ se egbe oka duu n…¦, eyi si ny…¦ ongwi eni byakpa lu iKosu y…¦y…¦. Tegblifan ma eyi k…¦ iRode di ny…¦ lu iPatara.
ACT 21:2 Ngwi eyi tu uwaa ongwi nle lu iFonishia n…¦, eyi kaka si ky…¦…¦ oky…¦…¦.
ACT 21:3 Dafi eyi di iSapru k…¦ n…¦, eyi ny…¦ ongwi atiis…¦ mgban mi uwaa lu iSiria. Eyi ka b…¦s…¦ mi iTai, imbe ngwi iwudza mgbi eyi ka dulu okye mani.
ACT 21:4 Ka kpats…¦ yi ama onoy…¦y…¦ angbeka emi imbe nani, n…¦ eyi la yi ama ikyidu onyi. Ama oky…¦d…î nton…¦, mi ikpewo Onodzi Osaan yegb…î gb…¦…¦ iPol no ka k…¦ iJerosalin ba.
ACT 21:5 Nghaduu ngwi on…î mgbi eyi wa ngy…¦ n…¦, Eyi dzata imbe na wikye lu iyayi. Ama oky…¦d…î yi owama b…¦yi …¦ngb…¦ duu tawo eyi tas…¦ mi ifyigeli, n…¦man eyi kw…¦s…¦ bib…î mi ondiiga.
ACT 21:6 Ngwi eyi ky…î eka se egbe oka ngy…¦ n…¦, eyi kaka iwudza, man ama si yid…î lu ud…¦.
ACT 21:7 Eyi kiyayi yi agaba mgbi eyi mi iTai ka b…¦s…¦ mi iPitolemai, imbe na eyi tangba yi ama onoy…¦y…¦ di dz…¦ yi ama egbe onyi.
ACT 21:8 Tegblifan n…¦, eyi dzita ma wa kaka iSisiria di dz…¦ ud…¦ iFyilipi inggis…¦ ogbees…î, o li onyi mbi inggis…¦ egyafa ngwu a dulu ma gb…¦…¦ nu ma gha ungwogye mi iJerosalin mani.
ACT 21:9 O dz…¦ yi engwengyaa nghi en…¦ ama nbongyul…î waba li yegb…î.
ACT 21:10 Ngwi eyi la imbe na egbe ibyibyi n…¦, oyegb…î oka ngwu a li kwun di Agabu ky…¦ iJudia ba.
ACT 21:11 Ngwi o ny…¦ ba mbi eyi n…¦, o kyi kyelu okpa obwa oshi mgbi iPol, kye bwa ewon af…î b…¦yi ab…î duu si gb…¦…¦, <<Onodzi Osaan gb…îgb…¦…¦, <Li it…î of…¦ n…¦ emi iJuda ama nto iJerosalin ka bwa otsungw…î okpa n…¦ adi kyon wo Udzengye ab…î aali.> >>
ACT 21:12 Ngwi eyi fwo ungw…în…¦ n…¦, eyi b…¦yi inggis…¦ ama nto mmanana t…¦ky…¦ yi iPol gb…¦…¦ no ka k…¦ iJerosalin ba.
ACT 21:13 Nghaduu iPol gb…¦…¦, <<Ky…în…¦ ngwi ema le tsukwu dile gbua ani eka? Ani wewo ikye adi obwa-bwa ta ba, kpaa odi kwulu mi iJerosalin ikye iyi mgbi Ots…¦ iYesu.>>
ACT 21:14 Dafi i y…¦…¦ gb…¦…¦ eyi ka ky…îky…î yan gb…¦ ba n…¦, eyi si dz…¦ ab…î ta nyan gb…¦…¦, <<Ni oweka mgbi Imgbasho ky…î.>>
ACT 21:15 Ngwi egbe nton…¦ wa ny…¦ n…¦, eyi kyi gbelu okye mgbi eyi si lu iJerosalin.
ACT 21:16 Ama oky…¦d…î angbeka mi iSisiria waf…î yi eyi di kye eyi ba ud…¦ Mnas…în, imbe ngwi i wo gb…¦…¦ eyi ka dz…¦ mani. Ongwu nose li ongyul…î nky…¦ mi iSapru di li onyi mbi ama oky…¦d…î emi abab…î ntonani.
ACT 21:17 Ngwi eyi kaka iJerosalin n…¦, ama onoy…¦y…¦ gb…¦ eyi ab…î efa.
ACT 21:18 Tegblifan n…¦ iPol b…¦yi eyi angbeka duu k…¦ oka di iJ…¦nsi, engyukwo emi iKrestu mi iJerosalin duu kpaa todz…¦ ele.
ACT 21:19 IPol kye angba kwulu ma di kyatse odz…¦ nya ma kl…¦kl…¦ ungw…î ngwi Imgbasho ky…î yi Udzengye mi ikpewo id…î ngwi ongwu ky…î mani.
ACT 21:20 Ngwi a fwo ungw…în…¦ mata, a si ts…¦ Imgbasho. Ta a nya iPol gb…¦…¦: <<An…î, o di dafi umbwo inggis…¦ idubu ibyibyi mi iJuda kyatitukwu, di dz…¦ yi itukwu olola ongyo Ola mgbi iMose mani.
ACT 21:21 A nya ma gb…¦…¦ abu le tso emi iJuda ama nto idzidz…¦ Udzengye gb…¦…¦ nu ma kyata dzita Ola iMose, le nya ma gb…¦…¦ nu ma ka ky…¦ engw…¦ ma iky…¦ ba hona ky…î alet…î mgbi eyi ba.
ACT 21:22 Li ky…¦m…¦ ngwi a ka fwo gb…¦…¦ abu badz…¦, nghan…¦ li eky…¦ i ka ky…î?
ACT 21:23 Ngy…¦se kyungw…î ngwi eyi nya abu mani. Engyul…î en…¦ to mm…¦n…¦ yi eyi ama nzondu yi Imgbasho.
ACT 21:24 Waf…î yi ama, ni ema wewo lu mi ewo ofw…î-fw…î mgbi ama mani di kpa mi ungw…î ngwi a ky…î duu, adzi ni a kpalu ma otu. Ta ali inggis…¦ ka ye gb…¦…¦ otsitsi dz…¦ mi odz…¦ ngwi a le gb…î ikpewo abu n…¦ ba, kpa i tso gb…¦…¦ abu abuabu gbela yi ola mgbi iMose.
ACT 21:25 Nghaduu mbi Udzengye ama onoy…¦y…¦ y…î, eyi teyi l…î oweka mgbi eyi k…¦ mboma gb…¦…¦ nu ma dz…¦ enggengga mi ungwogye ngwi a kye fif…¦ nu angwula, yi eyi, yi mmbw…¦ ngwi a ngw…î mfyumfye b…¦yi amah idza.>>
ACT 21:26 Tegblifan n…¦, iPol kye Engyul…î nton…¦ ka fw…î ewo yi ama. N…¦ o si k…¦ ozu okwukwo osunu Imgbasho mi iJerosalin oka nu ma ye egbe ngwi ewo ofw…î-fw…î n…¦ ka dondu ngwi a dika nu umba ikye ali inggis…¦ mgbi ama mani.
ACT 21:27 Ngwi egbe egyafa ntona wa dz…¦ kw…¦kw…¦ ongy…¦…¦ngy…¦ n…¦, emi iJuda angbeka mi ay…¦s…¦ mgbi Asia di iPol mi ozu okwukwo osunu Imgbasho mi iJerosalin. A si kyile etas…¦ angbi man a bwan,
ACT 21:28 le teela gb…¦…¦, <<Emi Israi, ya eyi ab…î na! N…¦n…¦ li ongyul…î nle tsungw…î nli ayin ba kpats…¦ mi ikpewo eyi yi ola mgbi eyi b…¦yi imbe n…¦ mani. Ungw…î oka nb…¦ efu y…î, o gbe emi iGriki kaka ifyud…¦ ozu okwukwo osunu Imgbasho mi iJerosalin di kwo idza kaka imbe Osaan n…¦ni.>>
ACT 21:29 (Lubana a tsekise di iTrofimu inggis…¦ emi Efesu yi iPol mi ogalu, a si kyi kyelu mi itukwu mgbi ama gb…¦…¦ iPol kyon kaka ifyud…¦ ozu okwukwo osunu Imgbasho mi iJerosalin.)
ACT 21:30 Ogalu na duu gboky…¦…¦, inggis…¦ ky…¦ onyonya mi ali agya duu. Ngwi a kpakli iPol n…¦, a kwon t…î mi ozu okwukwo osunu Imgbasho mi iJerosalin, lab…îlab…î n…¦ta a gbe onuf…¦ gy…¦tukwu.
ACT 21:31 Ngwi a le fya ongw…în n…¦, akw…î mgbi odz…¦ n…¦ kaka mbi agyegika mgbi oblakwuts…¦ mgbi emi iRoma gb…¦…¦ ogalu iJerosalin duu y…¦…¦ kwutukwutu.
ACT 21:32 Akponyi man agyegika na gbe engyukwo oblakwuts…¦ angbeka b…¦yi …¦ngb…¦ oblakwuts…¦ si tsinya lukwu ibyi inggis…¦. On…î ngwi emi ablodz…¦ ntona dili agyegika b…¦yi eblakwuts…¦ mgban n…¦, a nya ogbo iPol ibe.
ACT 21:33 Ta agyegika na ba wa bwa iPol di woola gb…¦…¦ nu ma bwan adi yi ashi efa. N…¦ o si byun it…î inggis…¦ ngwu o dz…¦ b…¦yi ungw…î ngwi o ky…î mani.
ACT 21:34 Mi idzidz…¦ ibyi inggis…¦ ntona angbeka tole gb…î it…îdz…¦ idzidza mi ela okwukwo, angbeka di li it…îdz…¦ idzidza, ngwi i fyumfye gb…¦…¦ agyegika na no difwi otsitsi odz…¦ mi ikye on…îgb…¦ n…¦, o si woola nu ma kye iPol lu ogalu oblakwuts…¦.
ACT 21:35 Dafi iPol wa to af…î ot…îk…¦ ozu n…¦, ablodz…¦ mgbi ibyi inggis…¦ ntona she ny…¦s…¦ i y…¦…¦ gb…¦…¦ oblakwuts…¦ ntona ka kyon kye-kye.
ACT 21:36 Ibyi inggis…¦ ama nky…¦ ma iyikpa ma tole wulu gb…¦…¦, <<Ngy…¦lu yan na!>>
ACT 21:37 Dafi ama oblakwuts…¦ wewo okye iPol lu ogalu mgbi ama n…¦, o si byi agyegika gb…¦…¦, <<Nin gb…îdz…¦ y…î…î l…î?>> Agyegika na byun gb…¦…¦, <<O li gb…î iGriki w…¦?
ACT 21:38 Abu li inggis…¦ Igyibiti ngwu wita eye di gbe ama ongw…î inggis…¦ idubu en…¦ lu imbe okplagada onoka nose ma w…¦?>>
ACT 21:39 IPol si nu uka gb…¦…¦, <<Ani li emi iJuda, n ky…¦ mi iTasu mi ogalu iSilisia, ogalu ingblim…î. Tsuutsu nin gb…îdz…¦ yi inggis…¦ nton…¦ni.>>
ACT 21:40 Ngwi o gb…¦ of…¦ mbi agyegika n…¦, iPol kwudz…¦k…¦ af…î ot…îk…¦ ozu di ky…î ibyi inggis…¦ ntona ab…î. Ngwi a dede n…¦, o gb…î yi ama mi ondu Aramai gb…¦…¦:
ACT 22:1 <<Emi ongwunani b…¦yi emi otsani, gad…î dafi ani ka natsondu ewen on…¦n…¦ n…¦ni.>>
ACT 22:2 On…î ngwi a fwon le gb…îdz…¦ yi ama mi ondu Aramai n…¦, a si zumy…¦. N…¦ta iPol gb…¦…¦:
ACT 22:3 <<Ani li inggis…¦ iJuda, a mba ani mi iTasu mi iSilisia, kpaa ani she mi igeli n…¦ni. Mi ab…î mgbi iGamalie a ny…¦ ani kl…¦kl…¦ mi ola mgbi emi otseyi, n di fyumfye itukwu mbi Imgbasho y…¦y…¦ dafi ema kpaa dz…¦ in…¦ n…¦ni.
ACT 22:4 Ani nu ama oky…¦d…î Of…¦ n…¦ is…î nghataa kaka ikwongye mgbi ama, di bwa engyaa yi engyul…î gbe ma wo obawi.
ACT 22:5 Okwukwo inggis…¦ ofif…¦ b…¦yi engyukwo okwakye duu kpaa ka ky…î obw…¦nd…¦. A di nu ani af…¦ k…¦ mbi emi ongwun…îma ama nto iDamasiko, ikye oka bwa ma dafi emi obawi mani, gbe ma ba iJerosalin wa kwo ma ad…î.
ACT 22:6 <<Mi on…î idzidz…¦ ud…¦ ngwi ani dz…¦ kw…¦kw…¦ okaka iDamasiko n…¦ta, osa t…îky…¦ esho wa dzaniwo akponyi.
ACT 22:7 Man ani gy…¦k…¦ es…¦ si fwo ela le gb…î yi ani gb…¦…¦, <ISol! iSol! Ky…îsin…¦ ngwi abu le nu ani is…î?>
ACT 22:8 Ani byun gb…¦…¦, << <Li abu em…¦ Ots…¦? O nya ani gb…¦…¦, << <Ani li iYesu ongwi iNadzareti, ngwu abu le nun is…î mani.
ACT 22:9 Ama nky…¦ yi ani di osa nani, kpaa a fwo ela mgbi ongwu nle gb…îdz…¦ yi ani ma ba.
ACT 22:10 Ani byun gb…¦…¦, << <Li alungw…î ngwi ani ka ky…î?> Ots…¦ nya ani gb…¦…¦, << <Kyato; lu iDamasiko. Mi imbe na a ka nya abu alungw…î ngwi a kye dz…¦ gb…¦…¦ abu ka ky…î duu.>
ACT 22:11 Ama nky…¦ yi ani ma byi ani ab…î kaka iDamasiko, ikyesin…¦ osa na bulu ani in…¦.
ACT 22:12 <<Ongyul…î iyin gb…¦…¦ Anania ba owa di ani. O li ngyo ola saan di dz…¦ yi mmw…¦ mbi emi iJuda ama nto imbe na duu.
ACT 22:13 O kwul…¦s…¦ dz…¦ ani k…¦ agya si nya ani gb…¦…¦, <<Ongwunani iSol, in…¦ mgbi abu no kwulu!>> Mi on…î na y…¦y…¦ ta ani yagba dun.
ACT 22:14 <<O si nya ani gb…¦…¦, <Imgbasho mgbi emi otseyi dulu abu gb…¦…¦ ni abu ye oweka mgban di di Ongwu Nle Nyaan na diy…¦ fwo odz…¦ mi ondun.
ACT 22:15 Abu ka li obw…¦nd…¦ mgban mbi inggis…¦ duu mi ungw…î ngwi abu di diy…¦ fwo n…¦ni.
ACT 22:16 Ma li eky…¦ ngwi abu le f…¦ on…¦n…¦? Kyato, kwu mi iyi mgban nu ma ky…î abu iBatisima di salu ali ibwubwe mgbi abu ngwuta.>
ACT 22:17 <<Ngwi ani y…¦ luba iJerosalin dile bib…î mi ozu okwukwo osunu Imgbasho n…¦, ani di in…¦ odiidi
ACT 22:18 di di Ots…¦ iYesu le gb…îdz…¦ yi ani gb…¦…¦, <Lu dzata iJerosalin Pl…¦, ikyesin…¦ a ka gbela obw…¦nd…¦ mgbi abu onuunu ikye ani ba.>
ACT 22:19 Nghaduu ani gb…¦…¦, << <Ots…¦, inggis…¦ nton…¦ ye ani dafi ani kyiky…¦ mi ozu okwakye mgbi emi iJuda kpats…¦, ikye ogbe ama nnoy…¦y…¦ mi iyi mgbi abu wo obawi di gbo ma ibe mani.
ACT 22:20 On…î ngwi a ts…¦ngw…î iStivin ikyegb…¦…¦ o le ky…î obw…¦nd…¦ mi iyi mgbi abu ma, ani kwudz…¦ ele di gbela yi ongw…î…îngw…î mgban di ngyo angwuto mgbi ama nle ngw…în mani.>
ACT 22:21 <<Ta Ots…¦ iYesu si nya ani gb…¦…¦, <Lu, ani ka d…î abu es…î lu kpini mbi Udzengye.> >>
ACT 22:22 Ibyi inggis…¦ gad…î mbi iPol nghataa o gb…îdz…¦ n…¦ ngy…¦. Man a kyile ela ondonyi gb…¦…¦, <<Ngw…în na, o m…¦ odz…¦ oshishe ba!>>
ACT 22:23 Dafi a le wulu di fwadulu angwuto mgbi ama ngwuta dile tombulu k…¦ esho n…¦,
ACT 22:24 agyegika nu ondu nu ma kye iPol kaka ogalu oblakwuts…¦. O nu ondu gb…¦…¦ nu ma gbon di byun ita, nu ma ye ungw…î nky…î duuse ibyi inggis…¦ tole fan ela ngha mani.
ACT 22:25 Dafi a nan las…¦ ogbon n…¦, iPol byi ongyukwo oblakwuts…¦ nkwudz…¦ mmana ma gb…¦…¦, <<Li ola ni abu gbo inggis…¦ iRoma ngwu a gb…în ikw…î di tun yi obube ba kpaa ibee?>>
ACT 22:26 Ngwi ongyukwo na fwo ngha n…¦, o k…¦ mbi okwukwo ogbakwu na ka kye tson gb…¦…¦, <<Li eky…¦ abu le ky…î? Inggis…¦ n…¦ li inggis…¦ iRoma.>>
ACT 22:27 Okwukwo ogbakwu na k…¦ mbi iPol ka byun gb…¦…¦, <<Nya ani n di abu li inggis…¦ iRomaa?>> O gb…¦…¦, <<Τê…¦n, ani li inggis…¦ iRoma.
ACT 22:28 N…¦ okwukwo ogbakwu na gb…¦…¦, <<Ani kpa udza she ikye oy…¦…¦ inggis…¦ iRoma.>> IPol nyan gb…¦…¦, <<Nghaduu ani y…î ani li imba mgbi iRoma.>>
ACT 22:29 Ama nwewo obyin ita ma byakpa y…¦yikpa. Okwukwo ogbakwu na abuon ewo waa lon on…î ngwi o difwi gb…¦…¦ iPol li inggis…¦ iRoma kpaa ongwu tan itse mani.
ACT 22:30 Tegblifan, ngwi i mina agyegika na oye it…îdz…¦ y…¦y…¦ ngwi emi iJuda gbe odz…¦ tukwu iPol ewo n…¦, o shan adi ta di nu ondu ni engyukwo ama ofif…¦ b…¦yi okwakye mgbi engyukwo duu kwakye. Ta o si kye iPol ba non dz…¦kunto mi iyayi ma.
ACT 23:1 IPol kye in…¦ byi okwakye mgbi engyukwo emi iJuda y…¦y…¦ si gb…¦…¦, <<Emi engwunani, ani kyid…î mgbi ani mbi Imgbasho mi itukwu asisa nghataa ba in…¦.>>
ACT 23:2 Mi odz…¦ n…¦ okwukwo inggis…¦ ofif…¦ Anania nu ama nkwul…¦s…¦ to kw…¦kw…¦ yi iPol ondu gb…¦…¦ nu ma gbobun ondu.
ACT 23:3 N…¦ iPol nya Anania gb…¦…¦, <<Imgbasho ka ta abu af…¦, abu inggis…¦ ikpala n…¦ni! Abu s…î mmana le gb…î ani ikw…î mi odz…¦…¦dz…¦ mgbi Ola, nghaduu abu abuabu foola mi onu ondu gb…¦…¦ nu ma ta ani af…¦!>>
ACT 23:4 Ama nkwudz…¦ yi iPol ntona byun gb…¦…¦, <<Abu shitukwu le fya okwukwo inggis…¦ ofif…¦ mgbi Imgbasho itoo?>>
ACT 23:5 IPol gb…¦…¦, <<Engwunani, ani yama ye gb…¦…¦ o li okwukwo inggis…¦ ofif…¦ ba, lubana a l…î gb…¦…¦, <Ka gb…îdz…¦ obube ikpewo inggis…¦ ogbe emidabu teyi ba.> >>
ACT 23:6 Ngwi iPol ye gb…¦…¦ angbeka li emi iSadusi angbeka di li emi iFarasi n…¦, o makw…î yi okwakye mgbi engyukwo ntona gb…¦…¦, <<Emi ongwunani, ani li inggis…¦ iFarasi, di li ongw…¦ inggis…¦ iFarasi. A le gb…î ani ikw…î ikyegb…¦…¦ ani kye eka byi oky…¦…¦-ky…¦…¦ mi ikwongye.>>
ACT 23:7 On…î ngwi o gb…îdz…¦ n…¦ ngha n…¦, odz…¦ oshiishi t…î mi idzidz…¦ mgbi emi iFarasi b…¦yi emi iSadusi, man okwakye na gheefa.
ACT 23:8 (Emi iSadusi noy…¦y…¦ gb…¦…¦ oky…¦…¦-ky…¦…¦ mi ikwu, b…¦yi engyes…î naadi emi onodzi dz…¦ma ba, kpaa emi iFarasi noy…¦y…¦ mi ungw…î nton…¦ duu.)
ACT 23:9 Odz…¦ oshiishi y…¦…¦ okwukwo n…¦man etsetse mgbi ola angbeka ama nli emi iFarasi tok…¦ unto di tangw…¦ kp…îkl…î…î gb…¦…¦, <<Eyi tu unkonyi obube mbi inggis…¦ n…¦ ba,>> A byi ma gb…¦…¦, <<Ni li onodzi hona ongyes…î gb…îdz…¦ yan ma y…¦?>>
ACT 23:10 Odz…¦ oshiishi na y…¦…¦ eye man okwukwo ogbakwu na mio gb…¦…¦ a ka kyi fwalu iPol ambulu-ambulu. O woola gb…¦…¦ oblakwuts…¦ nu ma ka kyen kyi gb…¦lu mi ab…î mfye yilen luba ogalu oblakwuts…¦.
ACT 23:11 Mi otu ongwi egbe na Ots…¦ wa dz…¦k…¦ yi iPol nyan gb…¦…¦, <<Fyumfye itukwu! Dafi abu gb…îdz…¦ mgbi ani mi iJerosalin na, li ngha ngwi abu dika gb…î ky…¦m…¦ mi igeli iRoma aali.>>
ACT 23:12 Mi egbegbe n…¦ emi iJuda kwakye di bwalu ondu mi ofaafa gb…¦…¦ ama ka gye hona wa ungw…î ba sede ama ngw…îlu iPol.
ACT 23:13 Inggis…¦ ngha ngwusefa ama nwodz…¦ mi ondu obwa-bwa n…¦ni.
ACT 23:14 A k…¦ mbi engyukwo ama ofif…¦ b…¦yi engyukwo emi iJuda ka nya ma gb…¦…¦, <<Eyi bwa mi ofaafa kp…îkl…î…î gb…¦…¦ eyi ka gye unkonyi ba sede eyi ngw…îlu iPol.
ACT 23:15 Nghawan…¦, ema yi okwakye mgbi engyukwo emi iJuda d…¦s…î mbi okwukwo ogbakwu mi ikpala no kyen ba mbi ema gb…¦…¦, i mina ema ofwo it…îdz…¦ saan mi odz…¦ mgban. Eyi wewo ogbongw…în duuse no wa to mm…¦n…¦ni.>>
ACT 23:16 Kpaa ngwi ongw…¦ ongwun…î iPol fwo ngha n…¦, o lu ogalu oblakwuts…¦ ka nya iPol.
ACT 23:17 Ta iPol kwu ongyukwo oblakwuts…¦ ntona onyi ela nyan gb…¦…¦, <<Kye ongwummafa n…¦ k…¦ mbi okwukwo ogbakwu, o dz…¦ yi odzim…î onyan.>>
ACT 23:18 Nghan…¦ o kyon k…¦ mbi okwukwo ogbakwu nani. O nyan gb…¦…¦, <<IPol inggis…¦ mi obawi na d…¦s…î mbi ani nya ani gb…¦…¦ ni ani kye mmafa n…¦ ba mbi abu ikyeky…¦ o dz…¦ yi odzim…î onya abu.>>
ACT 23:19 Okwukwo ogbakwu na byi ongwongyul…î mmafa na ab…î, kwon lu enggengga si byun gb…¦…¦, <<Li ali odz…¦ ngwi abu dz…¦yan onya ani?>>
ACT 23:20 O nyan gb…¦…¦, <<Emi iJuda bwondu onya abu ni abu kye iPol ba okwakye mgbi engyukwo emi iJuda ekeka mi …¦w…¦ gb…¦…¦ ama mina oye it…îdz…¦ y…¦y…¦ mi odz…¦ mgban.
ACT 23:21 Ka gbela yi ma ba, ikyesin…¦ inggis…¦ ngha ngwusefa da to osh…¦ le fan. A fa gb…¦…¦ ama ka gye hona wa ungw…î ba sede ama ngw…î iPol. A wewo ngy…¦ on…¦n…¦ le f…¦ ogbela-gbela mgbi abu mi oweka mgbi ama.>>
ACT 23:22 Okwukwo ogbakwu na wo ongyul…î mmafa na of…¦ di kwon ad…î gb…¦…¦, <<Ka nya inggis…¦ onyi kpaa gb…¦…¦ di abu nya ani odz…¦ n…¦ loo.>>
ACT 23:23 Ta o kwu engyukwo mgbi ama oblakwuts…¦ efa ela si nu ma ondu gb…¦…¦, <<Gbe oblakwuts…¦ ideli efa yi ama ot…î mmya ngwuseta d…în iwyo b…¦yi emi ash…î ideli efa nu ma wewo ok…¦ iSisiria mi obyi egyan…¦ mi otu in…¦.
ACT 23:24 Di wewo yi mmya angbeka nka kye iPol k…¦ mbi iG…îna iFelisi saan mani.>>
ACT 23:25 O l…î af…¦ sini:
ACT 23:26 IKladi…îsu iLisia, Ugabaidu, iG…îna iFelisi: N ta abu angba.
ACT 23:27 Inggis…¦ n…¦ emi iJuda bwan di wewo ongw…în, kpaa ani ba yi ibyi oblakwuts…¦ wa nagban, ikyeky…¦ ani fwo gb…¦…¦ o li imba mgbi iRoma.
ACT 23:28 Ani mina oye ungw…î ngwi a le gbe odz…¦ tukwun ewo mani, nghan…¦ ani kyon ba mbi okwakye mgbi engyukwo emi iJuda.
ACT 23:29 Man ani wa difwi gb…¦…¦ a le gbe odz…¦ tukwun ewo mi ikye ola mgbi ama, nghaduu it…îdz…¦ onyi ngwi a nu ngwi m…¦ ongw…în hona kyen wo obawi dz…¦ma ba.
ACT 23:30 On…î ngwi a nya ani ungw…î ngwi a kye weka oky…î yi inggis…¦ n…¦ mata, ani kyon d…¦s…î lu mbi abu akponyi. Ani di nu ondu gb…¦…¦ ama ngbe odz…¦ tukwun ewo ntona nu ma gb…î it…îdz…¦ mgbi ama ma nya abu.
ACT 23:31 Nghan…¦ oblakwuts…¦ ntona kyid…î ngwi a nu ma ondu mani, a kye iPol waf…î yi ama kyon lu byulu kaka Antipatri mi otu nani.
ACT 23:32 Tegblifan ma emi mmya tawon lu kpaa emi af…¦…¦s…¦ y…î yid…î luba ogalu mgbi oblakwuts…¦.
ACT 23:33 Ngwi emi mmya ntona ka kaka iSisiria n…¦, a kye af…¦ ma nu iG…îna di kye iPol kpaa won ab…î.
ACT 23:34 IG…îna gb…î af…¦ na si byita ay…¦s…¦ ngwi o ky…¦ ele mani. Ngwi o difwi gb…¦…¦ o ky…¦ mi iSilisia n…¦,
ACT 23:35 o gb…¦…¦, <<Ani ka fwo odz…¦ mgbi abu mi on…î ngwi ama ngbe odz…¦ tukwu abu ewo kaka mm…¦n…¦ mani.>> Ta o wo ma ola gb…¦…¦ nu ma kye iPol lu ud…¦ ut…î iHerude ka ngyon.
ACT 24:1 Ngwi i kye egbe eda n…¦ okwukwo inggis…¦ ofif…¦ Anania ba wa kaka iSidzaria yi engyukwo angbeka b…¦yi inggis…¦ oye ola iyin di iTetul…î, a si gbe it…îdz…¦ ngwi a le gbe odz…¦ tukwu iPol ewo mi ele ma to iG…îna es…¦.
ACT 24:2 Ngwi a kwu iPol ela kaka ifun n…¦, iTetul…î kye it…îdz…¦ mgbi elikw…î mgban tso iFelisi gb…¦…¦, <<Eyi to mi iyu mi ab…î abu on…î she, in…¦ mgbi abu odiidi na di ba yi okiyayi mi …¦s…¦ n…¦ni.
ACT 24:3 Ugabaidu iFelisi, mi ali imbe yi ali of…¦ duu, eyi gbela ungw…în…¦ di gbede nu abu kwuba.
ACT 24:4 Nghaduu ombe abu on…î bay…î, n le b…î gb…¦…¦ o ki shitukwu diy…¦ fwo eyi gwee.
ACT 24:5 <<Eyi difwi gb…¦…¦ inggis…¦ n…¦ li inggis…¦ oteeye, o li tu ola eye wo mi idzidz…¦ mgbi emi iJuda mi …¦s…¦ duu. O li inggis…¦ ogbe emi iNadzareti teyi mi eye
ACT 24:6 o di fya okye ayiwi kaka ozu okwukwo osunu Imgbasho mi iJerosalin; nghan…¦ eyi kpaklin. [Di mina ogb…în ikw…î mi ola mgbi eyi.
ACT 24:7 Kpaa agyegika iLisia ba mfyumfye wa kyon kyi lafwa mbi eyi,
ACT 24:8 kwu ama nkwun elikw…î nton…¦ ela nu ma ba], ni abu byi ma ita abuabu ta abu ka yagba otu otsitsi mi odz…¦ ngwi eyi gbe le tukwun ewo nton…¦ni.>>
ACT 24:9 Emi iJuda ntona gbela wo odz…¦ ngwi a gbe tukwun ewo ntonani, dile tso gb…¦…¦ odz…¦ nton…¦ li otsitsi.
ACT 24:10 Ngwi iG…îna ky…î iPol ab…î gb…¦…¦ no gb…îdz…¦ n…¦, o si wita ogb…îdz…¦ gb…¦…¦: <<Ani ye i kye onova ibyibyi ngwi abu li inggis…¦ ogbiikw…î mi …¦s…¦ n…¦ni; nghan…¦ n dz…¦ yi atsa onatsondu ewen.
ACT 24:11 O ka yagba byi inggis…¦ angbeka fwo i ngha egbe iwyodefa waba ngwi ani k…¦ iJerosalin oka sunu.
ACT 24:12 Ama ogbe odz…¦ tukwu ani ewo nton…¦ yama din le tangwodz…¦ yi inggis…¦ onyi mi ozu okwukwo osunu Imgbasho hona tu inggis…¦ wo mi ozu okwakye mgbi emi iJuda naadi mbeka onyonyi mi ogalu ba.
ACT 24:13 A dika yagba nu osa mi odz…¦ onyi ngwi a gbe le tukwu ani ewo n…¦ ba.
ACT 24:14 Nghaduu, ani gbela dafi engyukwo mgbi ama ts…¦w…¦ gb…¦…¦ of…¦ mgbi Ots…¦ ngwi ani le ky…¦d…î na li ayin ba mani. Kpaa ani kale sunu Imgbasho ngwi emi otsikyani sunu mani. Ani di noy…¦y…¦ mi alungw…î ngwi a l…î mi ola mgbi iMose b…¦yi af…¦ mgbi ama ogb…¦…¦s…¦ duu
ACT 24:15 ani di dz…¦ yi …¦w…¦ ogbe byiibyi mbi Imgbasho ungwonyi dafi inggis…¦ nton…¦ni, gb…¦…¦ emi osaan b…¦yi emi imbali duu ka ky…¦…¦ mi ikwu.
ACT 24:16 Nghan…¦ ani li fya alon…î ni itukwu mgbi ani dz…¦ saan mi in…¦ Imgbasho b…¦yi inggis…¦.
ACT 24:17 <<Ngwi ani wa dz…¦ma ba onova ibyibyi n…¦, n ba iJerosalin ikye okye umba wa nu emid…¦n emi adz…¦ di fif…¦ nu Imgbasho.
ACT 24:18 Ani fw…îlu ewani y…¦…¦ saan mi on…î ngwi a tu ani mi ifyud…¦ ozu okwukwo osunu Imgbasho le kyungw…în…¦ mani. Ibyi inggis…¦ to yi ani hona ani ndeye yi inggis…¦ oka ba.
ACT 24:19 Nghaduu emi iJuda angbeka to ay…¦s…¦ mgbi Asia, ngwi i gbuo a ki to mm…¦n…¦ mi inai abu nu ma sulu obw…¦nd…¦ obube ikpewo ani y…î a ki ky…î.
ACT 24:20 Hona ama nto mm…¦n…¦n…¦ nu ma gb…î ungw…î obube ngwu ma tu mbi ani mi on…î ngwi ani kwudz…¦ mi inai okwakye mgbi engyukwo emi iJuda mani.
ACT 24:21 Li mi ikye ungw…î onyi ngwi ani kyile ela esho on…î ngwi ani kwudz…¦ inai ma na ta: <Li it…îdz…¦ mgbi oky…¦…¦ mi ikwu ngwi abu le gb…î ani ikw…î in…¦ aani.> >>
ACT 24:22 Nghan…¦ iFelisi n ye odz…¦ Of…¦ mgbi Ots…¦ saan n…¦, tsamu egbe ikw…î lu iyayi. O gb…¦…¦, <<Ni iLisia okwukwo ogbakwu wa ba ta n ka ngy…¦lu ikw…î mgbi abu n…¦ni.>>
ACT 24:23 O wo ongyukwo oblakwuts…¦ ola gb…¦…¦ no nu ma ngyo iPol kpaa nu ma ka kyon tukwu ba di nu emi okan of…¦ nu ma tobyun mi imina mgban.
ACT 24:24 Ngwi egbe ny…¦ gwee n…¦, iFelisi yi owan iDrusila, nli ongyaa emi iJuda na waba. O d…¦s…î nu ma kye iPol ba wa fwon dafi o le gb…îdz…¦ oy…¦y…¦ onuunu mbi iYesu iKrestu mani.
ACT 24:25 Dafi iPol le tsuutsa mgbi odz…¦ saan, yi obwa ewo fyii b…¦yi ikw…î ogb…î…îgb…î nky…¦ iyayi n…¦, imio wo iFelisi man o gb…¦…¦, <<I gy…î ngha tsatso! O ka yagba lu. Nin wa tu on…î ta, n ka d…¦s…î mbi abu.>>
ACT 24:26 Mi it…în…î na, iFelisi ts…¦w…¦ gb…¦…¦ iPol ka kye akwatsa wo ongwu ondu, nghan…¦ o tonya od…¦s…î mbon ba.
ACT 24:27 Ngwi i ny…¦ onova efa n…¦, iPoshi…î iF…¦stusu d…îk…¦ ut…î gbikye iFelisi, kpaa ikyegb…¦…¦ i mina iFelisi okyumse yi emi iJuda n…¦, o dzata iPol mi obawi.
ACT 25:1 Ngwi iF…¦stusu gyuut…î kye egbe eta n…¦, o dzata iSisiria lu iJerosalin,
ACT 25:2 imbe na engyukwo ama ofif…¦ b…¦yi engyukwo emi iJuda ba mbon wa gbe it…îdz…¦ obube mgbi iPol tonk…¦ es…¦.
ACT 25:3 A si byakpa mina ab…î oyaaya mbi iF…¦stusu gb…¦…¦, no tobyi ama kye nyin…¦ iPol luba iJerosalin maama, ali ma a le wewo owa kwo of…¦ ngw…în.
ACT 25:4 IF…¦stusu nu uka gb…¦…¦, <<A kye iPol dz…¦k…¦ iSisiria, ma ani abuen kpaa n le k…¦ ele dzikan-dzikan.
ACT 25:5 Yeba non ky…î obube y…î, ni ama ogbe ema teyi angbeka waf…î yi ani ka gb…î obube ngwi o ky…î ma, mi imbe nani.
ACT 25:6 Ngwi iF…¦stusu kye egbe egyata naadi iwyo yi ama n…¦, o si lu iSisiria, tegblifan n…¦ o kwu ela gb…¦…¦ nu ma kwakye mi opiikw…î di noola gb…¦…¦ nu ma kye iPol ba mbi ongwu.
ACT 25:7 Ngwi iPol wa to n…¦, emi iJuda ama nky…¦ mi iJerosalin ba ma loka won, gbe odz…¦ okwulewo ama nli otsitsi ba le tukwun ewo.
ACT 25:8 Ta iPol si natsondu gb…¦…¦: <<N kyungw…î obube onyi mi ikpewo ola mgbi emi iJuda naadi ozu okwukwo osunu Imgbasho mi iJerosalin hona iSidza ba.>>
ACT 25:9 Ngwi i mina iF…¦stusu okyungw…î gb…¦…¦ no kpa emi iJuda n…¦, o nya iPol gb…¦…¦, <<O ka gbela ok…¦ iJerosalin azukwu ni ani ka fwo abu ikw…î mi it…îdz…¦ obube nton…¦ w…¦?>>
